  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的LLM在短序列上预训练后，即使经过额外训练也难以泛化到更长的序列，缺乏有效的长度泛化方法。

Method: 提出Randomized YaRN方法，结合YaRN位置外推、随机位置编码和长度课程，在短上下文训练中从更大的位置范围采样位置编码，使模型提前暴露于分布外的位置表示。

Result: 在<8K上下文训练数据上，在16K到128K序列长度范围内一致提升推理性能，在远超出分布的长度上提升最为显著，优于标准微调。

Conclusion: 逐步让模型暴露于分布外的位置分布是一种有效的长上下文推理泛化策略。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are typically pretrained on short sequences and then extended to work on longer sequences with additional training. However, such LLMs still struggle to further generalize to very long sequences. We propose Randomized YaRN, a training method that improves length generalization by combining YaRN-based positional extrapolation with randomized positional encoding and a length curriculum. During training on short context data, tokens are assigned YaRN positional encodings sampled from a larger position range, exposing the model to out-of-distribution positional representations even on short-context inputs. We evaluate Randomized YaRN on two challenging long-context reasoning benchmarks, BABILong and Multi-Round Coreference Resolution (MRCR). When training on data with <8K context, Randomized YaRN consistently improves reasoning performance on context lengths from 16K to 128K and outperforms standard fine-tuning, with the largest gains appearing at far out-of-distribution lengths. Our results suggest that progressively exposing models to OOD positional distributions provides an effective recipe for generalizable long-context reasoning.

</details>


<div id='cs.NI'></div>

# cs.NI [[Back]](#toc)

### [442] [A Reproducible Semantic Benchmark for Multivendor DSM-to-CLI Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20564)
*Jerônimo Menezes,Leonardo Bitzki,Diego Kreutz,Gefte Almeida,Marcio Pohlmann,Rodrigo Mansilha*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个DSM-to-CLI语义基准测试，用于评估LLM生成的多供应商网络配置，发现语义质量与操作可靠性正交，供应商效应主导用例效应，且重复运行离散度可预测投票不稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前网络自动化中，将高层网络意图翻译为正确的多供应商配置仍是一个核心挑战，因为语法正确的输出可能违反预期操作状态。尽管LLM取得进展，但缺乏可复现的跨供应商语义基准来进行严格评估。

Method: 构建可复现的DSM-to-CLI语义基准，涵盖5种云LLM、3个供应商、5个代表性用例，每个实验单元进行10次重复运行，使用固定裁判和显式故障分类法进行评估。

Result: 语义质量与操作可靠性正交；供应商效应主导用例效应；重复运行离散度强烈预测投票不稳定性；华为VRP暴露了聚合指标所隐藏的故障模式。

Conclusion: 多供应商、重复执行的语义基准对于科学严谨地比较基于LLM的网络配置系统是必不可少的。

Abstract: Translating high-level network intents into correct multivendor configurations remains a central challenge in network automation, as syntactically valid outputs may still violate the intended operational state. Despite recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs), the field still lacks reproducible semantic benchmarks for rigorous cross-vendor evaluation. This paper presents a reproducible DSM-to-CLI semantic benchmark covering five cloud LLMs, three vendors, five representative use cases, and ten repeated runs per experimental cell under fixed judges and an explicit failure taxonomy. Our results show that semantic quality and operational reliability are orthogonal, vendor effects dominate use-case effects, and repeated-run dispersion strongly predicts vote instability, with Huawei VRP exposing failure modes hidden by aggregate metrics. These findings demonstrate that multivendor, repeated-execution semantic benchmarks are essential for scientifically rigorous comparison of LLM-based network configuration systems.

</details>


### [443] [AI-Native Network Controller: A Modular Framework for Safe Agentic Control of Multi-Domain Network Infrastructure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20565)
*Merim Dzaferagic*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出了AI-NNC，一个开源模块化的AI原生网络控制器框架，通过协议无关架构和轻量级适配器实现跨多域网络的智能控制，支持数据集收集、AI实验和协调测试，为6G时代的自主网络管理提供了更安全的范式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有网络控制器多局限于特定域（如O-RAN RIC仅用于无线接入），缺乏对跨异构基础设施的AI驱动自动化原生支持，导致多域网络的协调智能控制仍是未解决的挑战。

Method: 设计协议无关架构，每个物理设备通过轻量级Python适配器集成，控制逻辑通过域特定控制应用实现，AI代理通过经过验证的应用而非直接向设备发送命令来操作，框架同时支持闭环控制、数据集收集、AI实验和协调测试。

Result: 实现了跨无线接入、光传输和核心网络等多域的统一智能控制，提出了更安全的自主网络管理范式。

Conclusion: AI-NNC为6G时代多域网络的AI原生统一控制提供了可行的开源模块化框架，通过应用层验证机制解决了AI代理直接操控网络设备的安全问题。

Abstract: The convergence of multiple network domains, including radio access, optical transport, and core networks, under unified intelligent control is a fundamental requirement for future 6G systems. This is important because existing network controllers remain largely domain-specific, such as the O-RAN RIC for radio, or they lack native support for AI-driven automation across heterogeneous infrastructure. As a result, safe and coordinated agentic control of multi-domain networks is still an open challenge. In this paper, we present the AI-Native Network Controller (AI-NNC), an open-source and modular framework that enables agentic AI control across diverse network domains. The framework is designed around a protocol-agnostic architecture in which each physical device is integrated through a lightweight Python adapter, while control logic is implemented through domain-specific control applications. Beyond closed-loop control, the framework also supports dataset collection, agentic AI experimentation, and coordinated testbed operation using the same validated control and measurement interfaces. This design enables a safer paradigm for autonomous network management, where AI agents operate through validated applications rather than issuing commands directly to network equipment.

</details>


### [444] [Shared Channel Capacity and Node Lifetime: An Empirical Study of the Lightning Network](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20566)
*Danila Valko,Jorge Marx Gómez*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文基于2019-2023年闪电网络拓扑快照数据，实证分析了节点寿命、连接度和容量之间的复杂关系，发现节点寿命对容量有正向但温和的直接影响，且主要通过节点度（连接数）的中介效应实现流动性积累；此外，层级地理结构和国家经济水平也会显著影响容量分布。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究已记录闪电网络的拓扑结构和流动性集中现象，但尚缺乏对节点寿命、连接度和容量三者之间联合关系的深入理解，因此本研究旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 使用大规模LN拓扑快照数据集（2019-2023），通过中介效应分析检验节点度在寿命与容量关系中的中介角色，并利用混合效应模型考虑地理层级结构和国家经济条件（如人均GDP）的影响。

Result: 节点寿命对容量有正向但温和的直接效应；该关系主要通过节点度的中介作用实现；寿命与度的交互效应存在显著异质性，在高连接度、高容量节点中更为明显；混合效应模型优于普通模型，证实了国家和区域层面的差异；人均GDP显著影响容量分布。

Conclusion: 闪电网络的流动性是时间动态、网络结构和经济背景共同作用的结果，本研究为支付通道网络的演化与效率研究提供了更整合的理解基础。

Abstract: The Lightning Network (LN) is a rapidly evolving payment channel network that enables scalable, off-chain transactions on top of Bitcoin. While prior research has documented its topological structure and liquidity concentration, the joint relationships between node lifetime, connectivity, and capacity remain insufficiently understood. This study provides a comprehensive empirical analysis of these relationships using a large-scale dataset of LN topology snapshots spanning the period 2019-2023. We examine whether node lifetime influences shared channel capacity, and whether this effect is mediated and moderated by node degree. In addition, we account for hierarchical geographic structure and explore the role of country-level economic conditions. The results show that node lifetime has a positive but relatively modest direct effect on capacity. This relationship is largely mediated by node degree, indicating that liquidity accumulation primarily occurs through increased connectivity. Furthermore, the interaction between lifetime and degree reveals significant heterogeneity, with stronger effects observed among highly connected and high-capacity nodes. Mixed-level models demonstrate superior explanatory power, highlighting the importance of country- and region-level variation. The inclusion of GDP per capita confirms that broader economic conditions significantly influence capacity distribution. Overall, the findings suggest that liquidity in the LN emerges from the interplay of temporal dynamics, network structure, and economic context. This study contributes to a more integrated understanding of payment channel networks and provides a foundation for future research on their evolution and efficiency.

</details>


### [445] [Handling Interoperability Issues in 6G ORAN: Lessons Learned from Research Lab-based Integrations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20568)
*Poonam Yadav,Yifan Liu,Mohit Bidikar,Rana M. Sohaib,Yi Chu,David Grace*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文研究了6G ORAN环境中多厂商互操作性问题，通过实验室案例分析了集成失败的根本原因，提出了解决方案和最佳实践，旨在为未来6G ORAN部署提供稳健指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管ORAN承诺提供网络灵活性、供应商中立的架构和增强的服务交付，但多厂商硬件和软件组件之间的真正互操作性仍是一个关键挑战，亟需解决。

Method: 基于实验室集成的案例研究，系统分析集成失败的根本原因，提出解决方案并建立最佳实践。

Result: 识别出6G ORAN环境中互操作性问题的根本原因，提出确保多厂商兼容性的解决方案，并建立一套未来部署的最佳实践。

Conclusion: 本研究将为6G ORAN生态系统开发稳健的指导方针，加速现实网络中无缝、可扩展的部署。

Abstract: As 6G networks continue to evolve, the Open Radio Access Network (ORAN) framework is gaining prominence for its promise of network flexibility, vendor-neutral architecture, and enhanced service delivery. However, achieving true interoperability across diverse hardware and software components from multiple vendors remains a critical challenge. This research focuses on identifying and addressing interoperability issues within 6G ORAN environments, leveraging insights from research lab-based integrations. By systematically analysing lab-based case studies, the study aims to uncover the root causes of integration failures, propose solutions to ensure smooth multi-vendor compatibility, and establish a set of best practices for future deployments. This work will contribute to developing robust guidelines for 6G ORAN ecosystems, accelerating seamless and scalable deployments in real-world networks.

</details>


### [446] [Infrastructure for the Agentic Web: Gap Analysis and Architecture from the Agentverse Platform](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20570)
*Robin Dey,Panyanon Viradecha*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文系统分析了Fetch.ai旗下Agentverse平台（截至2026年Q1的204个API端点），识别出8大类62项缺失能力，提出七层Agent云栈参考架构，并描绘了五条关键演进路径，为面向2030年的Agent原生云（Web4）基础设施提供了诊断与愿景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究大量关注AI Agent的行为与推理，但极少关注支撑Agent大规模可靠运行的底层基础设施。本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 对Agentverse平台进行实证审计，编目204个API端点，分类归纳出8大类62项缺失能力；基于此提出七层Agent云栈参考架构；刻画五条关键演进路径。

Result: 构建了缺失能力差距分类法（8类62项）；提出了七层Agent云栈架构；描述了五条从当前到2030年的关键演进路径。

Conclusion: 为当前Agent基础设施提供了诊断，并为面向Agent互联网（Web4）的云原生基础设施提供了技术上有依据的2030年愿景。

Abstract: The emergence of autonomous AI agents as first-class participants in digital infrastructure marks a fundamental inflection point in the evolution of the Web. While significant research has been directed at agent behaviour and reasoning, comparatively little attention has been paid to the infrastructure those agents require to operate reliably at scale. This paper addresses that gap with a systematic analysis of Agentverse, the agent cloud platform developed by Fetch.ai under the Artificial Superintelligence (ASI) Alliance, which represents one of the most mature production deployments of agent-native infrastructure available today.
  We make three principal contributions. First, we conduct an empirical audit of the Agentverse platform, cataloguing 204 API endpoints (Q1 2026) and characterising what is operational, partially deployed, or absent. From this audit we derive a Gap Taxonomy of eight categories encompassing 62 distinct missing capabilities, ranging from agent memory and observability to security, economic primitives, and enterprise scaling. Second, we propose a seven-layer Agent Cloud Stack -- a reference architecture for what a fully realised agent-native cloud should provide by 2030, grounded in the specific gaps we identify. Third, we characterise five critical evolution paths: from ephemeral storage to a full Agent Memory Cloud; from keyword discovery to a semantic, trust-weighted Agent DNS; from a single-protocol model to a multi-standard agent lingua franca; from single-instance hosting to Kubernetes-scale orchestration; and from simple token payments to rich agent economic primitives.
  Together these contributions provide a diagnostic of current agent infrastructure and a technically grounded vision for what the agent cloud must become to support the agentic web -- Web4 -- by 2030.

</details>


### [447] [AONA: A Comprehensive Architecture and Workflow Design for Global Agentic Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20573)
*Jinliang Xu,Runkai Zhu,Bingqi Li,Fanjie Nie,Jin Li,Jiagui Xie*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出AONA（智能体覆盖网络架构），一种面向智能体互联网（IoA）的新型覆盖网络架构，旨在解决现有互联网基础设施缺乏语义感知、动态能力发现和去中心化信任机制的问题，实现跨协议、跨平台的多智能体协作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有互联网基础设施基于TCP/IP和DNS设计，面向人类中心的主机间数据传输，缺乏支持自主智能体交互所需的语义感知、动态能力发现和去中心化信任机制，且受限于单一供应商的封闭生态。

Method: 首先从组织经济学、规模法则和"无政府代价"（Price of Anarchy）多学科角度论证多智能体协作的理论必要性。然后设计四层逻辑蓝图（基础层、互连层、协作层、应用层），并构建分布式节点基础设施（管理根节点、注册服务节点、发现服务节点、企业智能服务中心），实现动态操作流程（零信任身份签发、全局语义分类同步、意图驱动的语义发现、可信计费）。

Result: 提出了一套完整的AONA架构，能够在不干扰底层物理网络的前提下，实现跨协议和跨平台的互操作性，为全球智能体协作提供鲁棒、可扩展、安全的底层基础。

Conclusion: AONA为未来智能体互联网（IoA）提供了坚实架构基础，有望打破单一供应商封闭生态，推动多智能体间的可信、高效、去中心化协作。

Abstract: The rapid advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs) has established autonomous agents as the core vehicles for artificial intelligence applications. However, existing Internet infrastructures, primarily relying on TCP/IP and DNS, are designed for human-centric, host-to-host data transmission, inherently lacking the semantic awareness, dynamic capability discovery, and decentralized trust mechanisms required for autonomous agent interactions. To address these limitations and break the closed ecosystems of single vendors, this paper proposes AONA (Agentic Overlay Network Architecture), a novel overlay network architecture for the Internet of Agents (IoA). We first provide a multi-disciplinary scientific defense for multi-agent collaboration, demonstrating its theoretical necessity over single super-intelligence through the lenses of organizational economics, scaling principles, and the Price of Anarchy. AONA is then structured as a four-layer logical blueprint comprising the Base, Interconnection, Collaboration, and Application layers, which facilitates cross-protocol and cross-platform interoperability without disrupting the underlying physical network. To physically instantiate this blueprint, we design a distributed node infrastructure anchored by Management Root Nodes, Registry Service Nodes, Discovery Service Nodes, and Enterprise Intelligent Service Hubs for private domain integration. Finally, we detail the dynamic operational workflows-including zero-trust identity issuance, globally coordinated semantic taxonomy synchronization, intent-driven semantic discovery, and trusted metering for commercial settlement-that drive the network. This comprehensive architecture provides a robust, scalable, and secure foundation for the future of global agentic collaboration.

</details>


### [448] [LLM-assisted gNB Parameter Configuration for Radio Access Network](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20574)
*Yao-Cong Dong,Maria Amparo Canaveras Galdon,Ari Uskudar,Kuntal Chowdhury,Edwin K. P. Chong,Ray-Guang Cheng*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出一个基于大语言模型的自动化框架，通过合成数据生成和微调，实现gNB参数配置错误的自动诊断与修正，在OAI测试平台上将修正准确率从13.8%提升至92.7%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: gNB参数配置错误是RAN系统故障的常见原因，当前依赖人工分析网络日志，难以规模化扩展。

Method: 采用"配置-日志-修正"合成数据生成流水线，基于商用LLM生成修改后的配置和推理轨迹，微调LLM用于配置修正；推理时根据错误日志生成可部署配置，并引入RAG进一步提升性能。

Result: 在480个未见过的误配置场景中，微调将准确率从13.8%（零样本基线）提升至85.4%，RAG进一步将准确率提升至92.7%。

Conclusion: 该框架能够在不需人工干预的情况下自动从误配置中恢复，支持可扩展、自主化的RAN运维。

Abstract: gNB parameter misconfigurations are a common cause of system failures in radio access networks (RANs), and their diagnosis and correction rely on manual analysis of complex network logs that does not scale well. This paper proposes a large language model (LLM)-assisted framework for automatic gNB parameter configuration. The framework adopts a synthetic data generation pipeline following a configuration, log, correction workflow. Starting from a workable configuration and the gNB technical references, the pipeline uses a commercial LLM to generate modified configurations and derive structured reasoning traces from gNB error logs. The synthetic training data maps network states to corrective actions and is used to fine-tune an LLM for configuration correction. During inference, the fine-tuned LLM generates valid and deployable gNB parameter configurations from gNB error logs. The framework is validated on an OpenAirInterface (OAI) gNB testbed with 480 unseen misconfiguration scenarios, where fine-tuning improves correction accuracy from 13.8% (zero-shot baseline) to 85.4%, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) further improves accuracy to 92.7%. The results demonstrate that the framework may enable automated recovery from misconfigurations without manual intervention and supports scalable and autonomous RAN operation.

</details>


### [449] [BACC: Budget-Aware Calibration and Control for Horizontal Autoscaling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20575)
*Fan Liu,Guanqi Li,Behrooz Farkiani,Patrick Crowley*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: BACC是一个模型无关的预算感知水平自动缩放框架，通过分离工作负载预测、在线不确定性校准和预算控制三个关注点，利用自适应共形推断（ACI）和PI控制器，在遵守固定周期可靠性预算的同时调整副本数量。在Azure Functions轨迹和Kubernetes实验中，BACC实现了平均绝对合规差距0.42-0.44个百分点，优于原生HPA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有水平自动缩放器要么响应瞬时利用率，要么针对固定预测风险目标进行预配置，没有明确考虑周期级违规预算已消耗多少，导致预算充足时过度保守、预算耗尽时不够保守。

Method: BACC框架将三个通常纠缠的关注点分离：1) 工作负载预测（任意预测器）；2) 在线不确定性校准（使用自适应共形推断ACI）；3) 预算驱动的容量控制（使用比例-积分控制器根据预算消耗速度调整供给激进程度）。

Result: 在五个Azure Functions轨迹、三种合规级别和两种预测后端下，BACC实现了ARIMA平均绝对合规差距0.44个百分点、Chronos 0.42个百分点。Kubernetes实验中，在测量延迟和副本就绪等部署效应下，BACC改善了CPU阈值合规性。

Conclusion: BACC通过预算感知机制有效跟踪违规目标，在多种场景下实现接近目标的合规表现，证明了分离预测、校准和预算控制三关注点的有效性。

Abstract: Cloud services must continuously adapt replica counts to fluctuating demand while respecting fixed-period reliability budgets. Many horizontal autoscalers either react to instantaneous utilization or provision against a fixed predictive risk target. These policies do not explicitly account for how much of the period-level violation budget has already been consumed, so they can be overly conservative when the budget is healthy and insufficiently conservative when the budget is being depleted. We present BACC, a model-agnostic framework for budget-aware horizontal autoscaling. BACC separates three concerns that are often entangled in prior systems: workload prediction, online uncertainty calibration, and budget-paced capacity control. It wraps an arbitrary forecaster with Adaptive Conformal Inference (ACI) to calibrate workload uncertainty online, then uses a proportional--integral controller to adjust provisioning aggressiveness based on the observed pace of budget consumption. We instantiate BACC for CPU-threshold-based horizontal autoscaling in Kubernetes and evaluate it through trace-driven simulation and cluster replay experiments. Across five Azure Functions traces, three compliance levels, and two forecasting backends, BACC tracks the requested violation target closely, achieving mean absolute compliance gaps of 0.44 and 0.42 percentage points with ARIMA and Chronos, respectively. The Kubernetes experiments further show that the same controller improves CPU-threshold compliance over native HPA under deployment effects such as measurement delay and replica readiness.

</details>


### [450] [Exploring LLM in Semantic Communication for V2X Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20576)
*Sihem Bakri,Navdeep Singh,Nicola Marchetti*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合大语言模型（LLM）与图知识表示的语义通信框架，用于车联网（V2X）系统。该框架将原始传感器数据转化为简洁的自然语言消息，仅传输高层语义信息，从而在保持场景感知与协调能力的同时，平均降低33.54%的数据传输量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统V2X网络传输原始传感器数据导致带宽占用高且存在冗余信息交换，随着联网与自动驾驶车辆快速增长，急需更高效、智能的通信系统。

Method: 提出LLM与图知识表示结合的语义通信框架。LLM负责语义转换，将结构化传感器输入转化为简洁自然语言消息描述上下文与意图；同时基于V2X网络共享态势感知生成高层控制决策。通过多车道交通仿真对比语义与非语义模式的带宽使用。

Result: 平均减少33.54%的数据传输量，并在典型场景中展示了上下文感知的协调能力。

Conclusion: 基于LLM的语义通信能有效降低V2X网络带宽占用，同时保持车辆间的上下文感知与协同能力，为未来智能交通通信提供了新思路。

Abstract: The rapid growth of connected and autonomous vehicles has created a demand for more efficient and intelligent communication systems. Traditional Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) networks rely on transmitting raw sensor data, leading to high bandwidth usage and redundant information exchange. To address this, we propose a semantic communication framework that integrates a Large Language Model (LLM) with graph-based knowledge representation, to transmit only high-level, meaningful messages instead of raw data. Within this framework, the LLM performs semantic transformation, converting structured sensor inputs into concise natural language messages that describe context and intent. It also generates high-level control decisions based on shared situational awareness across the V2X network. A multilane traffic simulation was developed to compare semantic and non-semantic modes in terms of bandwidth usage. Results show an average 33.54% reduction in data transmission and illustrate context-aware coordination in representative scenarios.

</details>


### [451] [Human-Less LLM Serving: Quantifying the Human Tax on Throughput](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20577)
*Jianhui Lian,Li Chen,Dan Li,Yong Jiang*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文发现现有LLM服务系统为满足人类感知延迟指标（TTFT/TPOT）付出的吞吐量代价在长上下文场景下高达60-93%，并提出"无人类服务"的概念，主张服务系统应根据工作负载类别差异化地配置SLA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM服务系统普遍以TTFT和TPOT作为核心SLO指标，但这些指标仅为人类交互场景设计。在AI Agent等长周期任务中，程序化调用LLM的循环中并无人类观察延迟，因此系统为满足这些SLA牺牲了大量吞吐量，这种"人类税"是否必要值得质疑。

Method: 通过系统化的测量研究，在SGLang和Sarathi-Serve两个系统上，系统性地变化chunk大小、SLO设置、上下文长度和并发度，对比有/无人类SLA约束下的吞吐量差异。

Result: "人类税"导致的吞吐量损失随上下文长度显著增长，在64K tokens上下文中达到60-93%；高并发下损失更大；该现象在SGLang和Sarathi-Serve上定性一致。

Conclusion: 服务系统应暴露工作负载类别感知的SLA配置，而非对所有流量统一施加"人类税"；无人类服务的原型已在真实负载上验证可行性。

Abstract: Every major LLM serving system is designed to meet TTFT and TPOT SLOs. These metrics capture latency as a human user perceives it, and the mechanisms built to satisfy them are now standard infrastructure. We observe that long-horizon AI tasks call LLMs programmatically in tight loops where no human observes TTFT or TPOT. We ask: how much throughput do serving systems sacrifice to meet TTFT and TPOT SLAs that these workloads never need? We conduct a systematic measurement study across chunk sizes, SLO settings, context lengths, and concurrency levels. We find that the human tax on throughput grows substantially with context length and lands in the 60-93% range. At 64K token contexts, tightening the TTFT SLO to production-typical settings costs a large fraction of throughput versus the human-less baseline. The human tax is larger at higher concurrency and is qualitatively similar across SGLang and Sarathi-Serve. We term the unconstrained optimum human-less serving and provide a prototype demonstrating that it is practical on real workloads. Our findings argue that serving systems should expose workload-class-aware SLA configurations rather than silently applying the human tax uniformly to all traffic.

</details>


### [452] [RL-based Joint Coverage and Beam Optimization of High Altitude Platform Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20578)
*Guilhem Loussouarn,Nancy Nayak,Kin K. Leung,Patrick J. Baker*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习（RL）的框架，用于联合优化高空平台（HAPS）的定位与波束分配，以应对6G网络中非平稳的用户分布和流量动态。采用多策略近端策略优化（PPO）方法，在时空流量需求变化下同时学习HAPS定位和波束分配，仿真结果表明该联合优化方法显著提升了总吞吐量和用户满意度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: HAPS作为6G网络的重要组成部分，具有独特的移动自由度，能够应对静态地面网络和轨道受限卫星通信无法解决的非平稳性、时空用户分布及流量动态（如周期性人口迁移）等问题。

Method: 提出一个强化学习框架，采用多策略近端策略优化（Multi-policy PPO）方法，联合优化HAPS的定位覆盖与波束分配，适用于多HAPS场景。

Result: 所提RL方法能够有效学习控制HAPS定位和资源分配，动态适应用户分布和流量模式变化。联合优化方法显著提升了总吞吐量和用户满意度，优于启发式基线。

Conclusion: HAPS的动态移动性可以被成功利用来构建高响应性和高能效的下一代网络，为6G网络中的非平稳流量管理提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: High Altitude Platform Systems (HAPS) are a promising component of 6G network architectures, offering a unique "freedom of movement" that distinguishes them from static terrestrial networks (TN) and orbit-constrained satellite communications. This inherent mobility for HAPS provides a powerful mechanism to address non-stationarity, spatio-temporal user distributions, and traffic dynamics, such as periodic population migrations. This work addresses three key optimization problems in HAPS networks: (a) HAPS positioning for optimal coverage, (b) beam allocation, and (c) joint optimization of coverage and beam allocation. To tackle these complex challenges, a Reinforcement Learning (RL) framework is proposed, capable of operating in scenarios with multiple HAPS. The results demonstrate that the RL-based approach effectively learns to control HAPS positioning and resource allocation, dynamically adapting to variations in user distributions and traffic patterns. In particular, by employing a multi-policy Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) approach, the proposed framework jointly learns HAPS positioning and allocating beams under spatio-temporal traffic demand variations and outperforms heuristic baselines. Simulation results demonstrate that our joint optimization approach significantly improves sum-rate and user satisfaction, showing that the dynamic mobility of HAPS can be successfully exploited to create highly responsive and efficient next-generation networks.

</details>


### [453] [Closed-Loop L4S-as-a-Service in 5G-Advanced: NEF-PCF Control with NWDAF-Driven Assurance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20579)
*Ameer Shohail L,Ashish Goswami*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出C-L4SaaS框架，通过5G核心网功能协同实现L4S低延迟服务的闭环自动化保障，并建模为离散时间反馈系统分析稳定性与信令开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3GPP规范虽支持L4S使能，但缺乏统一闭环框架将应用意图与验证的服务质量结果关联起来，导致L4S在5G核心网中的集成功能孤岛化。

Method: 提出C-L4SaaS架构，协同NEF/PCF/NWDAF实现高层意图到PCC规则的翻译，利用UPF测量数据和NWDAF驱动的合规分析触发有界策略自适应，并建模为离散时间反馈系统推导稳定性条件与信令开销上界。

Result: 推导了在无线易变条件下的系统稳定性条件和信令开销上界，为参数选择提供理论指导。

Conclusion: 该核心网驱动编排提供了一条符合标准路径，用于在5G-Advanced生态中开放、保障和管理托管低延迟服务。

Abstract: Ultra-low latency services in 5G-Advanced demand deterministic delay and high-fidelity congestion signaling beyond peak throughput. While the Low Latency, Low Loss, Scalable Throughput (L4S) architecture enables sub-millisecond queuing through ECN-based feedback and Dual-Queue Coupled AQM, its integration within the 5G Core (5GC) remains functionally siloed. Current 3GPP Release 18/19 specifications provide mechanisms for L4S enablement, but they do not define a unified closed-loop framework that links application intent to verified service outcomes. To address this gap, we propose Closed-Loop L4S-as-a-Service (C-L4SaaS), an architectural framework that orchestrates the Network Exposure Function (NEF), Policy Control Function (PCF), and Network Data Analytics Function (NWDAF) for automated latency assurance. The framework translates high-level intent into enforceable PCC rules and uses NWDAF-driven compliance analytics, derived from User Plane Function (UPF) measurements, to trigger bounded policy adaptations. We model this interaction as a discrete-time feedback system and derive stability conditions and signaling overhead bounds to guide parameter selection under volatile wireless conditions. The proposed core-driven orchestration provides a standards-aligned path to expose, assure, and govern managed low-latency services in 5G-Advanced ecosystems.

</details>


### [454] [Role-Based Agentic AI for Intent-Driven Network and Service Orchestration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20580)
*Juan Parra-Ullauri,Talha Ahmed Khan,Daniel McHugh,Shipra Kapoor,Alistair Duke,Alicia Hey,Andy Corston-Petrie*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于角色的多智能体架构（MAS），用于端到端的意图编排，弥合了电信网络中业务支撑系统（BSS）与运营支撑系统（OSS）之间的鸿沟。该架构采用四层分层智能体系统（客户交互、战略规划、服务交付、基础设施供应），通过领导智能体协调、专业服务与资源智能体动态实例化，实现了从意图到业务再到网络的闭环治理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有意图驱动网络和智能体AI的研究主要聚焦于运营支撑系统（OSS）内的操作编排，缺乏一个能够打通业务支撑系统（BSS）与运营支撑系统（OSS）的集成框架，限制了"意图-业务-网络"的真正协同。

Method: 提出了一个基于角色的多智能体架构（MAS），该架构遵循功能分解、显式任务所有权、隐私保护域分离以及领域专属专家知识等原则，构建了四层分层智能体系统（客户参与层、战略规划层、服务交付层、基础设施供应层），其中领导智能体负责协调规划活动，服务智能体和资源智能体根据意图需求动态实例化。

Result: 通过概念验证实现，证明了结构化智能体协调能够弥合BSS-OSS之间的鸿沟，展示了基于智能体的MAS能够支持可问责、可扩展的意图驱动服务编排。

Conclusion: 本文所提出的角色化多智能体架构为电信网络中的端到端意图编排提供了一种可行的解决方案，通过模拟通信服务提供商（CSP）的组织结构，实现了从业务意图到网络基础设施的自动化和可问责协调。

Abstract: Telecommunication networks are increasingly complex due to heterogeneous technologies, diverse service requirements, and growing demands for resource efficiency and business agility. Intent-Based Networking (IBN) and, more recently, agentic AI have emerged as promising paradigms to address this complexity through autonomous network management. However, existing approaches primarily focus on operational orchestration within Operations Support Systems (OSS) and lack an integrated framework that spans Business Support Systems (BSS) and OSS, limiting the realisation of true intent-to-business-to-network coordination.
  This paper presents a role-based multi-agent architecture (MAS) for end-to-end intent orchestration that mirrors Communication Service Provider (CSP) organisational structures. The proposed framework applies principles of functional decomposition, explicit task ownership, privacy-preserving domain separation, and domain-specific expertise within a hierarchical four-layer agent system spanning customer engagement, strategic planning, service delivery, and infrastructure provisioning. Leadership agents coordinate planning activities, whilst specialised service and resource agents are dynamically instantiated according to intent requirements.
  A proof-of-concept implementation demonstrates the feasibility of bridging the BSS-OSS divide through structured agent coordination, illustrating how agentic MAS can support accountable and scalable intent-driven service orchestration.

</details>


### [455] [RDMACell: Token-Based Flowcell-Level RDMA Load Balancing for Large-Scale AI Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20581)
*Yang Qinyuan,Hua Xiaoxiang,Zhang Tong,Ren Fengyuan*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: RDMACell 是一个主机端流单元级负载均衡系统，通过主动将流拆分为多个流单元并在多路径上分发，结合基于令牌的接收端控制和原子双工作队列元素实现微秒级路径切换，在不修改固件或交换机硬件的情况下，相比ECMP和LetFlow分别降低44%和42.2%的99分位流完成时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RDMA的默认ECMP负载均衡机制因哈希冲突和大象流导致性能严重下降，现有方案（流细胞、包级别、可编程网络方案）各有局限：流细胞缺乏时间间隙、包级别存在乱序、可编程方案难以部署在通用商业基础设施。

Method: 提出RDMACell主机端负载均衡系统，主动将流拆分为多个流单元，通过原子双工作队列元素实现实时反馈，结合基于令牌的接收端控制，实现微秒级路径切换和极低丢包，无需修改NIC固件或交换机硬件。

Result: 在fat-tree拓扑、80%网络负载、all-to-all流量下，RDMACell相比ECMP降低44%的99分位FCT，相比LetFlow降低42.2%，尾延迟性能媲美最先进的网络内解决方案。

Conclusion: RDMACell作为一种主机端方案，在不依赖专用硬件的情况下有效解决了RDMA负载均衡的痛点，实现了高性能与可部署性的良好平衡。

Abstract: Remote Direct Memory Access (RDMA) is a core technol ogy for high-performance data center networks. However, its default Equal-Cost Multi-Path (ECMP) load-balancing mechanism often suffers from severe performance degra dation due to hash collisions and elephant flows. Existing solutions have obvious limitations: flowlet-based approaches lack the necessary time gaps to trigger flowlet switching, while packet-level approaches suffer from severe packet re ordering problems. On the other hand, although in-network programmable solutions can achieve fine-grained control, they are difficult to deploy in commercial general-purpose infrastructures. This paper presents RDMACell, a host-side flowcell-level load-balancing system. It proactively splits flows into mul tiple flowcells, distributes them across multiple paths, and achievesreal-timefeedbackthroughatomicdualWorkQueue Elements (WQEs). With token-based receiver-side control, RDMACellenables microsecond-level path switching and ex tremely low packet loss without modifying NIC firmware or switch hardware. The ns-3 simulations in a fat-tree topology show that under 80% network load with all-to-all traffic, RD MACell reduces 99th percentile FCT by 44% compared with ECMPandby42.2% compared with LetFlow, while achiev ing tail latency performance comparable to state-of-the-art in-network solutions

</details>


### [456] [Communication-Semantic-Aware RDMA Loss Recovery for QP-scalable Hyperscale AI Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20582)
*Xiaoxiang Hua,Tong Zhang,Zhenjiang Dong,Kun Zhu,Jiakun Bao,Fengyuan Ren*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 针对RDMA在分布式训练中RC模型扩展性差、尾延迟敏感的问题，提出了CSA-UD，一种基于通信语义感知的不可靠数据报机制，通过解耦传输与恢复、动态检测间隔、多路径传输等技术，在大规模集合通信下显著降低尾延迟并提升扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RDMA部署普遍采用RC模型，每个进程对需要专用QP，而RNIC缓存QP数量有限（几千个），超出后会引发PCIe往返开销，导致扩展性差。同时，全局同步机制使训练对尾延迟高度敏感，少量丢包就会延迟迭代完成。亟需一种兼具扩展性和可靠性的RDMA丢包恢复机制。

Method: 提出CSA-UD机制：(1) 解耦数据传输与丢包恢复；(2) 动态调整丢包检测间隔，加速尾恢复并利用分布式训练的同步语义；(3) 支持多路径传输与位图引导的重组，实现高吞吐且无需无损网络。

Result: 测试床实验和ns-3仿真表明：CSA-UD在大规模集合通信下显著降低尾延迟；高网络负载下，扩展性优于RC，99分位流完成时间比对比方案降低30%以上。

Conclusion: CSA-UD通过通信语义感知设计，在保持高吞吐的同时有效解决了RC模型的扩展性瓶颈和尾延迟问题，适用于大规模分布式训练场景。

Abstract: Current artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructures widely adopt Remote Direct Memory Access (RDMA) to support high-performance communication. Training trillion-parameter models involves frequent collective communication operations, such as All-Reduce and All-to-All, which generate intensive RDMA traffic. Existing RDMA deployments predominantly use the reliable connection (RC) model, where each process pair requires a dedicated queue pair (QP). This leads to poor scalability: since the RDMA-capable network interface card (RNIC) can cache only a few thousand QPs, excess entries trigger PCIe round-trip penalties. Meanwhile, global synchronization makes training sensitive to tail latency, where a few packet losses can delay iteration completion. To address these challenges, we propose Communication-Semantic-Aware Unreliable Datagram (CSA-UD), a novel RDMA loss recovery mechanism that combines scalability and reliability. CSA-UD decouples data transmission from loss recovery and dynamically adjusts the loss detection interval, accelerating tail recovery and exploiting the synchronization semantics of distributed training. It further supports multipath transmission and bitmap-guided reassembly, enabling high throughput without requiring lossless fabrics. Testbed experiments and ns-3 simulations show that CSA-UD significantly reduces tail latency under large-scale collective communication. Under high network load, it achieves better scalability than RC and over 30% lower 99th percentile flow completion times compared with counterparts.

</details>


### [457] [Physical-AI: From Channel Awareness to Environmental Intelligence in 6G Wireless Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20583)
*Farooque Hassan Kumbhar,Kapal Dev,Sunder Ali Khowaja,Alexandros-Apostolos A. Boulogeorgos,Mehdi Bennis,Yuanwei Liu*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出Physical-AI架构，通过自监督时空无线电基础模型将分布式观测转化为潜在环境表征，结合多任务推理头和神经决策层，实现主动式环境感知无线网络，在6G场景中显著降低中断概率和阻塞响应延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统无线网络依赖瞬时CSI被动响应信道变化，缺乏环境建模能力；ISAC虽增加感知功能，但仍缺少显式环境建模与决策机制，难以应对动态部署中的阻塞、移动性和干扰问题。

Method: 提出Physical-AI架构：(1) 自监督时空无线电基础模型将分布式观测编码为共享潜在环境表征；(2) 多头推理网络估计阻塞、用户分布、移动动态和干扰结构；(3) 任务特定神经决策层将表征映射为主动式上下文感知控制动作，形成感知-建模-决策闭环。

Result: 仿真结果表明该预测性框架能有效降低中断概率和阻塞响应延迟，特别是在波束切换延迟增加的情况下优势更为明显。

Conclusion: Physical-AI超越了ISAC范式，通过融合感知、世界建模和闭环决策，为智能6G系统提供了一种有前景的架构方案。

Abstract: Conventional wireless networks rely on instantaneous channel state information (CSI) and react to channel variations without explicitly modeling the physical environment, limiting their ability to handle blockage, mobility, and interference in dynamic deployments. Paradigms such as Integrated Sensing and Communication (ISAC) add sensing capabilities but lack explicit environment modeling and decision-making. In this article, we propose Physical-AI: a new architecture for environment-aware wireless networking, where radio signals enable sensing, modeling, and interaction with the environment in addition to data transmission. The framework proposes a self-supervised spatiotemporal radio foundation model for transforming distributed radio observations into a shared latent environmental representation. Multiple inference heads operate on this representation to estimate key environmental properties, including blockage, user distribution, mobility dynamics, and interference structure. A task-specific neural decision layer maps this representation to proactive, context-aware control actions. By integrating perception, world modeling, and decision-making in a closed loop, the proposed framework goes beyond ISAC and establishes Physical-AI as a promising architecture for intelligent 6G systems. Simulation results show that the proposed predictive framework reduces outage probability and blockage-response latency, particularly under increasing beam-switching delays.

</details>


### [458] [Protocol-Aware Tokenization and Architecture Co-Design for Wireless Packet Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20587)
*Swadhin Pradhan,Shazal Irshad,Jerome Henry*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 该论文通过2x2对比实验发现，协议感知的tokenizer对无线网络数据包轨迹基础模型性能影响最大（精度波动32点），而架构变化仅影响2点。更深层GPT（PLUME-DEEP）达98.2%精度，Mamba-2变体（PLUME-MAMBA）以96.1%精度实现更高吞吐和更长上下文。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究在构建无线网络数据包轨迹基础模型时，tokenizer（协议感知分词）与模型架构（深度GPT vs Mamba-2状态空间模型）哪个因素更重要。

Method: 基于PLUME的协议感知tokenization，分别扩展GPT深度至24层（PLUME-DEEP），并将同一tokenizer迁移至Mamba-2架构（PLUME-MAMBA），进行2x2对比实验。

Result: PLUME-DEEP达98.2% top-1精度（较12层提升32点），PLUME-MAMBA达96.1%精度且吞吐量提升1.7倍、上下文长度扩展2倍。Tokenizer变化导致32点精度波动，架构变化仅2点。

Conclusion: 协议感知的tokenization是主要性能杠杆，模型架构是部署时可权衡精度与速度的旋钮。

Abstract: What matters more for building foundation models for wireless packet traces: the tokenizer or the architecture or both? To answer this question, we build on PLUME Anonymous [2026], which introduced protocol-aware tokenization for 802.11 traces; we scale model depth and transfer the same tokenizer to a fundamentally different architecture family. A deeper GPT (PLUME-DEEP, 24 layers) reaches 98.2% top-1 accuracy, gaining 32 points over the original 12-layer design, while a Mamba-2 state-space variant (PLUME-MAMBA) achieves 96.1% with 1.7x higher throughput and 2x longer context. The key insight emerges from a controlled 2x2 comparison across tokenizers and architectures: changing the tokenizer swings accuracy by 32 points; changing the architecture moves it by only 2. Protocol-aware tokenization is the primary performance lever, and the backbone becomes a deployment knob trading accuracy for speed.

</details>


### [459] [Optimization-as-a-Service via Multi-Agent Large Language Model for Radio Access Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20590)
*Chaoqun You,Yueyue Dai,Xingqiu He,Yue Gao,Rahim Tafazolli,Yong Liang Guan*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出将物理资源块（PRB）分配问题作为由大语言模型多智能体系统提供的"优化即服务"（OaaS），通过场景理解、目标生成、求解器和反思智能体构成闭环架构，并引入单次反思蒸馏机制训练轻量级学生模型，实现6G RAN中接近最优、超低推理时延的资源分配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统PRB分配依赖人工建模或标准AI算法，但6G RAN面临前所未有的服务多样性、指数级动态变化（基站波动、用户规模、严格QoS需求），现有方法缺乏灵活性和自演化能力，亟需一种通用的自适应解决方案。

Method: 提出LLM多智能体系统（OaaS架构），包含四个智能体：场景理解（感知实时环境）、目标生成（动态构建优化问题）、求解器（求解问题）、反思（评估并修正）。为消除迭代反思的计算延迟，进一步提出单次反思蒸馏机制，训练轻量级学生模型直接预测优化后的目标参数。

Result: 实验表明该框架实现了接近最优的资源分配性能，且推理延迟极低。理论上界定了单次策略的性能差距。

Conclusion: LLM-MA的OaaS范式能够为6G RAN提供灵活、自演化、上下文感知的资源分配方案，兼顾最优性与实时性要求。

Abstract: The physical resource block (PRB) allocation in Radio Access Networks (RANs) traditionally relies on case-by-case manual problem construction or, more recently, learning-based artificial intelligence (AI) methods. However, the sixth-generation (6G) RAN environments confront unprecedented service diversity and exponential dynamics, featuring volatile fluctuations in active base stations (BSs), user scale, and stringent Quality-of-Service (QoS) requirements. Faced with such conditions, both manual models and standard AI algorithms remain fundamentally rigid, lacking the flexibility to adapt and self-evolve. To provide a one-size-fits-all solution, we propose treating the PRB allocation problem as an Optimization-as-a-Service (OaaS) provided by a large language model multi-agent (LLM-MA) system. This fundamentally reshapes RAN resource allocation by utilizing agents to dynamically construct optimization problems and automatically determine objectives tailored to real-time scenarios. Our closed-loop architecture, integrating scene understanding, objective generation, solver, and reflection agents, enables context-aware, self-correcting formulation. To eliminate the computational latency of iterative reflection, we introduce a one-shot reflection distillation mechanism, training a lightweight student model to directly predict refined objective parameters. We theoretically bound the performance gap of this one-shot policy. Experimental results demonstrate our framework achieves near-optimal resource allocation with ultra-low inference latency.

</details>


### [460] [Delay-Adaptive Speculation Control for Low-Latency Edge-Cloud LLM Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20591)
*Kangkang Sun,Jianhua Li,Xiuzhen Chen,Junyi He,Minyi Guo*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文研究边缘-云协同推理中投机解码的在线草稿长度控制问题，提出一种基于最优停止理论的阈值策略，并设计UCB-SpecStop在线控制算法，在真实平台上验证其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在分布式边缘-云推理场景中，投机解码的草稿长度需要在线控制：长草稿可分摊通信延迟但降低接受率，短草稿可保持接受率但增加通信轮次，现有方法未能很好地平衡这一权衡。

Method: 将草稿长度选择建模为比率型最优停止问题，证明最优长度为有限延迟单调阈值；针对时变网络扩展为马尔可夫调制信道模型；针对未知环境提出UCB-SpecStop算法，具有理论遗憾界保证。

Result: 在Jetson Orin Nano Super边缘节点与RTX 3090 Ti云端节点的真实测试平台上，验证了相变现象（转变点约83ms和111ms），UCB-SpecStop相比SpecDec++降低延迟最高22.4%，接近离线oracle的0.2-2.4%，优于朴素UCB最高7.5%。

Conclusion: 本文从理论上刻画了边缘-云推理中投机解码延迟与草稿长度的最优权衡关系，所提在线控制算法能自适应动态网络环境，显著降低推理延迟。

Abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates large language model (LLM) inference by using a lightweight draft model to propose tokens and a larger target model to verify them in parallel. In distributed edge-cloud inference, however, draft length must be controlled online: longer drafts amortize communication delay but reduce token acceptance, whereas shorter drafts preserve acceptance but trigger more communication rounds. We formulate this tradeoff as a ratio-type optimal stopping problem and prove that the optimal draft length is a finite delay-monotone threshold. The analysis identifies a critical delay below which single-token speculation is optimal and shows that the optimal length grows only logarithmically with communication delay. For time-varying networks, we extend the model to Markov-modulated channels and establish, under a bounded horizon and monotone stopping-region conditions, a state-dependent threshold policy. For unknown environments, we propose UCB-SpecStop, an online control algorithm with gap-free and gap-dependent expected regret bounds of $O(L_{\max}\sqrt{K_{\max}T\log(K_{\max}T)})$ and $O(\sum_{k:Δ_k>0}L_{\max}^2\log(K_{\max}T)/Δ_k)$. We implement the method on a real edge-cloud testbed with a Jetson Orin Nano Super edge node and an RTX~3090 Ti cloud node, using Qwen and Llama draft--target pairs. Experiments validate the predicted phase transition, with transition points near 83~ms and 111~ms. Qwen matches the geometric prediction, while Llama requires empirical-prefix calibration due to heavy-head acceptance. Across the tested delay grid, UCB-SpecStop reduces per-token latency over SpecDec++ by up to 22.4\%, approaches an offline oracle within 0.2--2.4\% in communication-dominated regimes, improves over naive UCB by up to 7.5\%, removes the 14.0--18.7\% gap caused by static tuning under delay drift, and gains 3.0--6.8\% with contextual channel-state information.

</details>


### [461] [Empowering Embodied AI in 6G Networks: Architecture, Enablers, and Open Challenges](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20592)
*Junaid Sajid,Sheikh Salman Hassan,Wenshuai Liu,Yan Kyaw Tun,Yaru Fu,Nguyen H. Tran,Zhu Han,Cedomir Stefanovic,Tharmalingam Ratnarajah,Muhammad Mahtab Alam*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向具身人工智能的6G网络统一框架，将通信、感知、计算与控制联合设计为闭环系统，以支持具身智能体的感知-通信-行动交互需求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI原生无线架构以连接为中心，无法支持大规模任务驱动的具身智能，而具身AI（如机器人、自动驾驶车辆、XR设备）需要闭环感知-通信-行动交互，通信性能直接影响物理行为和控制稳定性。

Method: 提出一个统一的具身AI原生6G系统框架，将通信、感知、计算与控制作为闭环基础设施联合设计；引入系统级PCA架构，并讨论关键技术、代表性应用及开放挑战。

Result: 明确了未来6G系统需从智能通信平台演进为具身物理智能的主动使能者这一核心论点，并识别了多模态智能、边缘部署、评估、可信度及实际实现等关键挑战。

Conclusion: 未来6G系统必须超越连接中心范式，转变为主动赋能具身物理智能的闭环基础设施。

Abstract: Embodied artificial intelligence (AI) is emerging as a key driver of the sixth-generation (6G) wireless networks by enabling agents that continuously perceive, communicate, and act in dynamic physical environments. Unlike conventional AI systems that process disembodied data, embodied agents such as robots, autonomous vehicles, and extended reality (XR) devices operate through closed-loop perception-communication-action (PCA) interactions, where communication performance directly affects physical behavior, control stability, and task success. However, existing AI-native wireless architectures remain largely connectivity-centric and are not designed to support task-driven embodied intelligence at large scale. Therefore, we present a holistic framework for embodied AI-native 6G systems, in which communication, sensing, computation, and control are jointly designed as a unified closed-loop infrastructure. We introduce a system-level PCA architecture, discuss key enabling technologies and representative applications, and highlight major open challenges in multimodal intelligence, edge-aware deployment, evaluation, trustworthiness, and practical implementation. Our central argument is that future 6G systems must evolve from intelligent communication platforms into active enablers of embodied physical intelligence.

</details>


### [462] [Performance evaluation of Secure DSRC (S-DSRC) protocol for Vehicular Adhoc Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20594)
*Surender Kumar,Vikram Singh*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出了一种安全专用短程通信（S-DSRC）协议，通过密钥交换机制实现VANETs中车辆间安全通信，在中型网络中性能优于传统DSRC协议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VANETs中车辆在高速公路上常面临网络连接不足和安全通信问题，现有DSRC协议缺乏足够的安全保障，需要一种能够确保安全消息传输的协议。

Method: 提出S-DSRC协议，在车辆间引入秘密密钥、私钥和公钥交换机制，对安全消息进行加密传输。

Result: S-DSRC协议在中型网络中性能优于现有DSRC协议。

Conclusion: S-DSRC协议能够有效保障VANETs中车辆间通信的安全性，并在中型网络中展现出更好的性能表现。

Abstract: Vehicular adhoc networks (VANETs) provides communication between the vehicles like V2V and also provides communication between the Vehicles and the Road side Units. Recently, VANETs have greater scope in establishing interconnectivity between the vehicles on road and off road. These networks ensure the timely report of accidents happening in highways, alerting the nearest hospital, insurance claims if the vehicle is breakdown, etc. Vehicles often travels in highways lack the network connectivity, which then can be ensured through many technology implementations like 4G, 5G, LTE networks and protocols like IEEE 802.11p and DSRC were helpful in achieving the effectiveness of vehicular networks. In this paper, we have proposed a protocol Secure Dedicated Short-Range Communication (S-DSRC) protocol that can establish connectivity between the vehicles in a secure way. There will be a secret key, private kay and public key exchange between the vehicles so that the safety message can be sent to vehicles in a secure way. Our results show that S-DSRC protocol outperforms the existing DSRC protocol for a medium sized network.

</details>


### [463] [Frequency Lock Encoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20813)
*Joshua Montierth,Michael Rice,Philip Lundrigan*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出一种协议无关的副信令层，通过在现有通信信号中引入受控的微小频偏来嵌入并行信息流，且对主接收机透明，实现了主链路几乎无影响的副链路通信。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代无线系统为应对最坏情况设计了过剩的同步带宽，这些同步余量未被充分利用。本文旨在利用这一冗余，在不改变现有协议的前提下，实现额外的并行通信能力。

Method: 在发送端有意引入微小、受控的载波频偏，采用频移键控（FSK）方式将副信息叠加在主信号上。这些偏移被主接收机的CFO校正机制自然吸收，从而实现向后兼容。系统针对单载波协议进行分析。

Result: 通过仿真和软件无线电外场实验验证，实现了可靠的副链路通信，同时对主链路性能的退化可忽略不计。

Conclusion: 该系统适用于临时频谱共享和战术边缘的去中心化协调，在无需修改现有硬件或协议的情况下增强了频谱利用效率。

Abstract: Modern wireless systems are designed with excess synchronization bandwidth to ensure reliable operation under worst-case conditions. This paper presents a protocol-agnostic secondary signaling layer that exploits this unused synchronization margin by intentionally introducing small, controlled frequency offsets into an existing communication signal to embed a parallel stream of information. These offsets are naturally absorbed by the primary receiver's carrier frequency offset (CFO) correction mechanisms, allowing the primary data stream to remain intact while enabling simultaneous secondary communication. The proposed signaling method employs a frequency-shift-keyed overlay engineered to remain within the stable operating region of conventional carrier-synchronization loops, ensuring backward compatibility and transparency for legacy receivers. We analyze the system for single-carrier protocols, characterize the trade-offs between secondary throughput and the impact on the primary link, and validate performance through both simulation and over-the-air experiments using software-defined radios. Results demonstrate reliable secondary communication with negligible degradation to primary performance, making our system well-suited for ad hoc spectrum sharing and decentralized coordination at the tactical edge.

</details>


### [464] [Can Quantum Receiver Beat the SIC Limit in Multiple Access Networks?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20956)
*Shiqian Guo,Huaiyu Dai,Jianqing Liu*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出一种集成前端量子感知与后端量子信号处理的全栈量子接收机，利用简单量子比特阵列实现干扰多用户信号的并行提取，在低信噪比条件下超越传统SIC的信道容量极限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索能否通过实际可实现的量子接收技术超越SIC的信道容量极限，填补传统SIC在量子接收领域的认知空白。

Method: 提出全栈量子接收机架构：前端利用简单量子比特阵列（无需复杂纠缠资源）并行提取干扰信号，后端进行量子信号处理，利用量子关联测量和叠加态实现并行处理。

Result: 在部分运行场景下信道容量超越SIC极限；在低SNR区域，频谱效率和检测效率均显著优于传统SIC算法及多接入信道容量上限。

Conclusion: 量子接收技术在低信噪比多用户干扰场景中展现出显著的量子优势，为5G/B5G无线接收提供了超越经典容量的可行路径。

Abstract: Successive interference cancellation (SIC) is an important technique for 5G/B5G wireless receivers to resolve interfering signals from multiple users. While SIC has been proven to approach the channel capacity limit in many settings of multiple access networks, it remains unknown if this limit can be surpassed by an advanced yet practically implementable quantum receiver technique. In this work, we answer this quest by proposing a full-stack quantum receiver that integrates front-end quantum sensing with back-end quantum signal processing. The proposed technique leverages simple qubit ensembles without using any complex entanglement resources to parallelly extract interfering multiuser signals, with a channel capacity beyond the limit of SIC in some operational corners. In performance evaluation, we report notable quantum advantage over the ultimate multiple-access channel capacity limit and practical SIC algorithms in low-SNR regimes in terms of spectral efficiency and detection efficiency due to the receiver's ability to exploit quantum correlated measurements and superposition-enabled parallel processing.

</details>


### [465] [HOWLR: A Client-Driven Approach to BGP Hijack Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21845)
*Constantine Doumanidis,Anya Kalogerakos,Maria Apostolaki*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出HOWLR，一种让终端主机利用同前缀下服务作为"见证者"来独立检测BGP劫持攻击的方法，利用攻击者难以同时冒充所有同前缀服务的非对称性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统BGP劫持检测依赖于网络运营商，终端主机在数小时内处于暴露状态。需要一种让终端主机能够独立、快速地检测前缀级冒充攻击的方法。

Method: 利用BGP劫持的基本不对称性：攻击者可以劫持整个IP前缀的流量，但难以大规模冒充该前缀内所有使用不同CA认证的TLS服务。HOWLR将这些同前缀的TLS认证服务作为"见证者"，当客户端无法验证这些服务时，即判定存在攻击。

Result: HOWLR能够保护89%的Tor中继前缀和75%的比特币矿池网关前缀，验证了该方法的可行性。

Conclusion: 终端主机可以利用同前缀下多样化TLS认证服务作为见证者，有效且独立地检测BGP劫持攻击，为终端用户提供了一种无需依赖网络运营商的防护手段。

Abstract: BGP hijacking enables impersonation attacks in which adversaries divert traffic at the prefix level and serve malicious content to unsuspecting clients. Detecting such attacks has traditionally been the responsibility of network operators, leaving end hosts exposed for hours. We argue that end hosts can detect prefix-level impersonation independently, exploiting a fundamental asymmetry: a BGP hijack diverts traffic for an entire IP prefix, but impersonating every co-hosted service within that prefix is prohibitively difficult at scale, especially if each service is authenticated by a different Certificate Authority. We propose HOWLR, a tool that operationalizes this insight by using co-hosted, TLS-authenticated services as witnesses: if a client can no longer authenticate them, it has evidence of an ongoing attack. This work evaluates the feasibility of this method by quantifying the existence and diversity of witnesses in the wild. We show that HOWLR can protect 89% of Tor relay prefixes, and 75% of Bitcoin pool gateway prefixes.

</details>


### [466] [From RAN Control to Agentic Intelligence: Architecture and Vision for Energy Efficient AI-RAN](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21955)
*Sabrine Aroua,Alexis I. Aravanis,Ilias Chatzistefanidis,Hamza Abbar,Anh-Khoa Dang,Anastasios Giovanidis,Salah-Eddine El Ayoubi,Stephane Senecal,Martha Vlachou Konchylaki,Navid Nikaein*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向6G网络的智能体原生RAN架构，通过语义意图抽象和LLM驱动的协调机制，融合O-RAN的结构化控制与AI-RAN的统一愿景，实现对异构工作负载的能效感知多目标优化，以解决分布式AI原生RAN中日益增长的能耗问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 6G网络将采用高度分布式、AI原生的RAN架构，通信与AI工作负载共用基础设施，导致能耗显著增加。现有O-RAN控制框架主要基于策略驱动，缺乏跨多应用的适应性能效协同；而AI-RAN虽推动AI与RAN融合，但尚无高效机制来联合协调性能、时延与能耗。

Method: 提出一种智能体(AI Agent)原生的RAN架构，将O-RAN的结构化控制与AI-RAN的统一愿景桥接。核心包括：(1) 语义意图抽象，将高层需求转化为可执行策略；(2) LLM驱动的协调机制，实现自适应编排、冲突解决和能效感知的多目标优化。

Result: 通过AI-for-RAN和AI-on-RAN的代表性用例，展示了所提框架在提高资源效率和降低运行能耗方面的有效性，为可持续6G网络铺平道路。

Conclusion: 本文提出的智能体AI原生RAN架构能够有效联合编排异构工作负载的性能、时延与能耗，为6G网络实现可持续的能效优化提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Future 6G networks will rely on highly distributed, AI-native Radio Access Networks (RANs), where communication and AI workloads share a common infrastructure. This evolution, combined with increasing deployment density and continuous AI processing, is expected to significantly increase RAN energy consumption. While Open RAN (O-RAN) introduces a programmable and modular control framework through the RAN Intelligent Controller (RIC) and Service Management and Orchestration (SMO), current approaches remain largely policy-driven, limiting adaptive energy-aware coordination across multiple applications. In parallel, AI-RAN promotes the convergence of AI and RAN infrastructures through AI-for-RAN, AI-on-RAN, and AI-and-RAN paradigms, yet efficient mechanisms to jointly orchestrate performance, latency, and energy remain an open challenge. This article proposes an agentic AI-native RAN architecture that bridges O-RAN's structured control with AI-RAN's unified vision. Leveraging semantic intent abstraction and Large Language Model (LLM)-driven coordination, the framework enables adaptive orchestration, conflict resolution, and energy-aware multi-objective optimization across heterogeneous workloads. Through representative AI-for-RAN and AI-on-RAN use cases, we show how such coordination can improve resource efficiency and reduce operational energy consumption, paving the way toward sustainable 6G networks.

</details>


### [467] [When Cooperation Should End: Maneuver Coordination Cancellation for Connected Automated Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22052)
*Rafael Molina-Masegosa,Sergei S. Avedisov,Miguel Sepulcre,Javier Gozalvez,Onur Altintas*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文首次提出并实现了网联自动驾驶中机动协调取消的完整设计方案，包括状态机、消息集和决策逻辑。实验表明，该机制能减少车辆在不成功协调中的时间浪费，提升协调触发次数和成功率，从而改善协作驾驶效率与鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注如何启动和执行机动协调，但对协调变得不合适时应如何终止关注不足。缺乏取消机制会导致车辆长时间困于无法成功的协调中，影响系统效率。

Method: 设计了完整的机动协调取消方案，包括状态机（定义协调状态及取消触发条件）、消息集（用于通信取消指令）和决策逻辑（判断何时取消）。采用V2X通信实现车辆间协调取消的协商与执行。

Result: 取消机制显著减少了车辆在无法成功的协调中的停留时间，使车辆更快释放以参与新协调；提高了协调触发次数和成功协调的数量。

Conclusion: 机动协调取消能有效提升协作驾驶效率，为后续增强网联自动驾驶的效率和鲁棒性奠定了基础。

Abstract: Maneuver coordination is essential for cooperative connected automated driving, enabling vehicles to negotiate maneuvers and interactions through V2X communication. While prior work has largely focused on how to initiate and execute coordinations, considerably less attention has been given to how ongoing coordinations should be terminated when they become unsuitable. This paper introduces the first complete design and implementation of maneuver coordination cancellation, including a state machine, message set, and decision-making logic. Our evaluation shows that cancellation significantly reduces the time vehicles spend in coordinations that cannot succeed, allowing them to become available for new maneuvers sooner. This increases the number of triggered coordinations and improves the number of successful maneuver coordinations. Overall, the study demonstrates that maneuver coordination cancellation improves cooperative driving, and establishes a foundation for further refinements that can enhance the efficiency and robustness of connected automated driving.

</details>


### [468] [Multi-Target Maneuver Coordinations: Unlocking Coordination Opportunities in Connected Automated Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22055)
*Rafael Molina-Masegosa,Sergei S. Avedisov,Miguel Sepulcre,Takayuki Shimizu,Javier Gozalvez,Onur Altintas*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于多目标选择的协同驾驶策略，允许车辆在协调操作前从多个潜在目标中灵活选择，无需修改现有协调协议。该方法显著增加了成功执行的协同次数，计算成本低，且能更早启动操作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有协同驾驶方法通常只针对单一预定义目标车辆进行协调，导致协同机会受限，无法充分利用潜在的协作交互场景。

Method: 提出多目标选择（Multi-Target Selection）方法，在原有协调协议和操作执行逻辑不变的情况下，扩展了协调前的决策过程，使车辆能够从多个候选车辆中识别并选择最合适的协调对象。

Result: 多目标协同驾驶显著增加了触发并成功执行的协调次数，计算成本低，无需分析大量潜在目标车辆，同时保持了较高的协调成功率，并支持更早的操作启动。

Conclusion: 多目标选择是一种轻量级且高效的协同驾驶扩展方案，能够在不增加系统复杂度的前提下，显著提升协同驾驶的触发频率和实用性。

Abstract: Maneuver coordination is a key enabler of connected and automated driving, allowing vehicles to negotiate and execute maneuvers that would otherwise be difficult, inefficient or unsafe. Existing approaches and use cases typically assume coordination with a single predefined target vehicle, which limits the number of coordination opportunities. This paper introduces a maneuver coordination approach based on multi-target selection, which allows a vehicle to identify and select among multiple potential coordination vehicles for a given maneuver. Multi-target maneuver coordination does not require modifications to the maneuver execution logic or to the underlying coordination protocol. Instead, it extends the decision-making process preceding coordination, enabling vehicles to exploit a broader set of feasible cooperative interactions. Results show that multi-target maneuver coordination significantly increases triggered and successfully executed coordinations while maintaining a low computational cost, as the proposed approach achieves these gains without requiring the analysis of a large number of potential target vehicles. These improvements preserve coordination success rates while enabling earlier maneuver initiation.

</details>


### [469] [Game-Theoretic Framework for Private Data Sharing in Vehicular Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22115)
*Yousef AlSaqabi,Yinan Zhou,Faisal Nawab,Bhaskar Krishnamachari*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于博弈论的隐私保护框架，用于去中心化车辆数据采集系统，通过安全多方计算和Stackelberg竞争平衡隐私与经济激励，实验验证了其有效性和隐私保护能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 去中心化车辆数据采集系统中，车辆原始数据直接暴露存在严重隐私风险，且缺乏有效的激励机制来平衡隐私保护与数据共享的经济收益。

Method: 采用混合架构（车辆、独立服务器、协调节点、数据消费者），结合安全多方计算（SMPC）和Stackelberg博弈模型，动态调整隐私-经济激励平衡，使车辆根据隐私风险和收益自主决策是否参与。

Result: 基于真实车辆位置数据实验表明，该框架能有效量化隐私风险（通过评估攻击者利用部分数据重建车辆路径的准确度），在保护隐私的同时维持活跃的数据市场。

Conclusion: 该框架在隐私保护与数据市场活跃度之间取得了良好平衡，为车辆数据安全共享提供了一种实用且可扩展的市场化解决方案。

Abstract: We present a novel game-theoretic framework designed to enhance privacy and scalability in decentralized vehicular data collection systems. The proposed hybrid architecture comprises vehicles that supply sensor data, independent servers that process data via secure multiparty computation, a coordinator node that manages data flow, and data consumers that set economic incentives. Crucially, our framework ensures that only the data consumer can access the fully aggregated data, preventing individual raw data exposure and significantly reducing privacy risks. By integrating principles of the Stackelberg competition from game theory, our approach dynamically balances privacy and economic incentives, enabling vehicles to make participation decisions based on perceived privacy risks and incentives. We empirically validate our framework using real-world vehicular location data, quantifying privacy risks by evaluating the accuracy with which a potential adversary can reconstruct a vehicle's path using only a subset of the shared data. This paper details the development and deployment of a data-trading platform within this framework, introducing a practical and privacy-preserving marketplace for profitable vehicle data sharing. Through experiments and simulations, we evaluate the effectiveness of the system in preserving privacy and explore the dynamics that influence vehicle participation. Our findings highlight the robustness of the proposed framework in preserving privacy while supporting an active data market.

</details>


### [470] [SHACR: A Graph-Augmented Semi-Autonomous Framework for Multi-Class Conflict Resolution in Smart Home IoT Automation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22312)
*Leena Marghalani,Walid Aljoby,Suayb S. Arslan*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: SHACR是一个智能家居冲突检测与修复框架，通过构建形式化知识图谱将LLM推理从文本脆弱性中解脱出来，采用多跳图遍历统一检测逻辑、语义和物理三类冲突，并驱动闭环修复流程。实验表明，在203条规则、70个公寓的测试中，引入知识图谱后分类错误降低36.7%，F1从0.59提升至0.79，再经少样本校准达0.95，而同样校准对无图LLM几乎无效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能家居规则看似独立无害，但并发执行时通过共享设备、环境变量和物理拓扑产生隐藏的跨规则交互，导致不安全、浪费或隐私威胁行为。而现有冲突检测器要么只检测静态语法冲突，要么只处理特定环境介导交互，未能将两者统一，也无法为非专业用户提供可操作的修复建议。

Method: SHACR构建形式化有向知识图谱，将设备、能力、物理状态和TCA规则编码为可遍历实体，并将物理因果关系提升为第一类图边，从而使冲突检测从脆弱的文本推理转变为确定性的多跳图遍历，统一了逻辑、语义和物理冲突类别。同时，采用闭环的Scan-Explain-Repair-Validate工作流，用图结构约束LLM的动作空间。

Result: 在203条规则、70个公寓的智能建筑测试中，固定底层LLM不变，引入SHACR知识图谱后分类错误下降36.7%，F1从0.59提升至0.79；进一步结合少样本校准后F1提升至0.95，而同样的校准对无图LLM几乎无效。

Conclusion: 该工作挑战了当前AI范式，证明结构化知识表示对于可靠的IoT自动化管理远比提示工程或底层模型架构更为关键。

Abstract: Smart home automation increasingly relies on user-defined rules across heterogeneous IoT devices. While these rules appear harmless in isolation, their concurrent execution creates hidden, cross-rule interactions via shared devices, environmental variables, and physical topology. These interactions result in unsafe, wasteful, or privacy-threatening behaviors that are completely invisible to text-only analysis. Existing conflict detectors remain siloed, catching either static syntactic conflicts or specific environment-mediated interactions without unifying the two or providing actionable repairs for non-expert users.
  This paper presents SHACR, a smart home conflict resolution framework that anchors Large Language Model (LLM) unpredictability by grounding its reasoning in a formal, directed knowledge graph. SHACR encodes devices, capabilities, physical states, and Trigger-Condition-Action rules as typed, traversable entities. By elevating physical cause-effect relationships to first-class graph edges, SHACR transforms conflict detection from fragile text inference into deterministic multi-hop graph traversal, unifying logical, semantic, and physical conflict classes. It drives a closed-loop Scan-Explain-Repair-Validate workflow that uses the graph to bound the LLM's action space. We evaluated SHACR on a testbed of 203 rules deployed across 70 apartments within a smart building. By holding the underlying LLM fixed and introducing SHACR's knowledge graph, classification errors drop by 36.7\%, F1 rises from 0.59 to 0.79, and few-shot calibration further lifts F1 to 0.95, whereas the same calibration barely helps a graph-free LLM. Ultimately, this work challenges the current AI paradigm, establishing that structured knowledge representation is a far more critical factor for dependable IoT automation management than prompt engineering or underlying model architecture.

</details>


### [471] [Radio Resource Management for the Uplink of Hybrid Beamforming Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22643)
*Yuan Quan,Haseen Rahman,Catherine Rosenberg*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文研究基于混合波束赋形的多信道蜂窝系统上行链路无线资源管理，提出离线启发式算法将运行时间降低两个数量级，并进一步给出低复杂度在线启发式算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混合波束赋形场景下，射频链数量有限导致无法选择所有模拟波束，且用户功率需每时隙分配，因此需要每时隙的联合资源管理优化，但联合优化问题复杂度随用户数指数增长，亟需高效算法。

Method: 首先建立每时隙联合优化问题（包含波束选择、用户选择、功率分配、调制编码方案选择及数字波束赋形）；提出离线启发式算法（运行时间降低两个数量级，性能接近最优）；在此基础上进一步提出低复杂度在线启发式算法。

Result: 离线启发式算法在保持接近联合优化性能的同时，将运行时间降低了两个数量级；在线启发式算法也通过了离线目标性能的验证。

Conclusion: 所提离线启发式算法能高效获取工程见解，在线启发式算法可在实际系统中实现低复杂度资源管理。

Abstract: This paper studies radio resource management (RRM) for the uplink of a multi-channel cellular system with hybrid beamforming based on analog beamforming using predefined codebooks and zero-forcing digital beamforming. We first formulate a per-time slot joint RRM optimization problem, which includes beam selection, user selection, power allocation, modulation and coding scheme selection, and digital beamforming. A per-time slot formulation of the RRM problem is necessary because the power budget of a user equipment (UE) needs to be allocated per time slot to its assigned channels which are not known a priori, and because we consider the case where the number of radio frequency chains is not large enough to select all possible analog beams, thereby requiring per-slot beam selection. This problem can be solved for at most a few UEs because the number of variables grows exponentially with the number of UEs. In order to obtain results with more UEs, we propose an offline heuristic that reduces the runtime to obtain results by two orders of magnitude, while achieving performance close to the joint optimization. This offline heuristic allows us to obtain engineering insights on the impact of different system parameters as well as a target performance that we use to validate the low-complexity online heuristic that we propose.

</details>


### [472] [Performance Evaluation of Selection Strategies for Inter-Satellite Paths in Walker-Delta Constellations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23135)
*Marvin Felix Braun,Moritz Flüchter,Michael Menth*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文研究了LEO卫星星座中用户终端与网关之间的路径选择策略，分析了不同策略对路径长度、跳数、路径更换率和链路使用率等指标的影响。在包含1156颗卫星的Walker-Delta星座中进行评估，结果表明路径选择对延迟和路径变化有显著影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LEO卫星星座中，随着卫星绕地球旋转，需要不断重新选择通信路径。目前缺乏对路径选择策略如何影响延迟、路径变更频率和链路使用率等关键指标的系统性研究。

Method: 定义了路径候选生成方式，提出了三种启发式路径选择策略，并在单层Walker-Delta星座（1156颗卫星）的大量用户终端-网关场景下进行评估。

Result: 路径选择策略对欧氏距离、跳数等延迟相关指标以及路径更换率（路径抖动）均有显著影响。

Conclusion: 路径选择策略的选择对LEO卫星通信网络的性能至关重要，需要在延迟和路径稳定性之间进行权衡。

Abstract: In LEO satellite constellations, traffic between a user terminal and a gateway is carried over a satellite path. As the satellite constellation rotates around Earth, a new path must be reselected repeatedly from a set of path candidates. In this paper, we study the impact of path selection strategies on several metrics: path length in terms of Euclidean distance and hop count, path-change rate, and rate of used links. These metrics are relevant because they affect either communication latency or the complexity of control and resource management. We explain how path candidates are generated, define three heuristic path selection strategies, and evaluate them over a large set of UT-GW scenarios within a single shell of a Walker-Delta constellation with 1,156 satellites. Overall, the results show that path selection has a significant impact on both latency-related metrics and path churn.

</details>


### [473] [LLM-Aided A* Search in Non-Geometric Network Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23136)
*Nouf Alabbasi,Esraa Ghourab,Omar Alhussein*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种LLM辅助的A*算法，通过让大语言模型生成中间路径点来引导搜索，在非几何网络图中将扩展节点数减少约50%，同时路径成本仅略微增加。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非几何网络图（如延迟、金钱成本等）缺乏空间距离作为启发式信息，导致传统A*搜索效率低下，需要一种能提供有效启发式引导的方法。

Method: 将LLM与A*算法结合：LLM生成中间路径点引导搜索方向，同时利用地标距离构建可采纳的ALT启发式函数，并将紧致的结构特征（启发式估计）提供给LLM以弥补非几何图中缺失的距离信号。

Result: 在多达2000个节点的多种图拓扑上，LLM生成的路径点将扩展节点数减少约50%，路径成本仅略有增加；紧凑结构特征比高级提示工程技术更有效。

Conclusion: LLM引导与传统搜索算法的结合在非几何网络优化中具有潜力，能显著提升搜索效率且保持近似最优性。

Abstract: Finding the shortest path in non-geometric network graphs, where edge weights encode arbitrary metrics such as latency or monetary cost rather than spatial distance, poses a challenge for informed search algorithms. Their efficiency depends on an informative heuristic, typically supplied in spatial domains by geometric distances that have no counterpart on non-geometric graphs. We propose a large language model (LLM)-aided A* algorithm in which an LLM generates intermediate waypoints that guide the A* expansion toward promising graph regions. At the core of the approach are landmark distances, which serve both as an admissible landmark-based (ALT) heuristic for the search and as a compact structural feature that, supplied to the LLM, restores the distance-to-destination signal it would otherwise lack on non-geometric graphs. Our comprehensive experiments on multiple graph topologies with up to 2,000 nodes demonstrate that LLM-generated waypoints reduce the number of expanded nodes by around 50% while incurring only a marginal path cost increase compared to the optimal solution. We further analyze the impact of prompt engineering and show that incorporating compact structural features, namely heuristic estimates, is more effective than advanced prompting techniques. These findings demonstrate the potential of combining LLM- based guidance with classical search algorithms for efficient network optimization.

</details>


### [474] [Wireless Personal Agent: Extending Wireless Intelligence from Networks to Terminals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23255)
*Jiedan Tan,Fang Liu,Jingwen Tong,Shengli Zhang,Jun Zhang,Wing Shing Wong*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出WISPA框架，利用大语言模型（LLM）代理实现终端侧无线资源管理的自动化与个性化，通过将在线执行与离线LLM反思解耦，在资源受限终端上实现高效、自适应的资源配置。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无线网络智能主要聚焦网络侧优化（如吞吐量、时延、覆盖），忽视了用户侧感知体验（如应用上下文、移动规律、服务成本、隐私偏好等）。亟需一种能够根据用户个性化偏好进行终端侧智能资源管理的方案。

Method: 提出WISPA框架，解耦为两大部分：1）轻量级在线执行器：使用可解释的偏好参数进行确定性资源决策，满足时延敏感需求；2）离线LLM代理：分析终端侧轨迹数据，优化用户画像并更新在线偏好参数，实现自我演进。

Result: 在校园通勤路线场景下验证，WISPA能够学习用户特定的连接风格，并根据偏好变化自适应调整接入决策。

Conclusion: WISPA实现了终端侧资源的智能化、个性化自主管理，在保障实时性的同时通过LLM代理不断完善用户偏好，展现出自演进能力和实际应用价值。

Abstract: Wireless networks are evolving from connectivity-oriented infrastructures into intelligent and personalized service platforms. Existing wireless intelligence remains centered on network-side optimization, improving objectives such as throughput, latency, and coverage. Nevertheless, besides network performance, wireless intelligence also depends on user-perceived experience via application context, mobility routine, service cost, privacy preference, and long-term usage behavior. This article proposes WISPA, a Wireless Intelligent Self-evolving Personal Agent framework for automated terminal-side resource management based on large language model (LLM)-based agent. To overcome the resource constraints on terminals, WISPA decouples the latency-sensitive online resource execution from offline LLM agent reflection. In this way, a lightweight online executor makes deterministic resource decisions using interpretable preference parameters; While an offline LLM agent analyzes terminal-side traces, refines user profiles, and updates online preference parameters for subsequent decisions. At last, we demonstrate the practical applicability and benefits of WISPA for terminal-side resource allocations on a campus commute route. Numerical results show that WISPA learns user-specific connection styles and adapts access decisions as preferences change.

</details>


### [475] [Protection Switching in Hybrid Hollow-Core and Single-Mode Fiber Networks: Challenges, Analysis, and Mitigation Strategies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23554)
*Md Ghulam Saber,Zhiping Jiang*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文研究了混合空心光纤（HCF）和单模光纤（SMF）网络中的保护切换挑战。通过蒙特卡洛模拟，量化了1+1专用保护和共享备份路径保护（SBPP）两种架构下的色散步长、GSNR惩罚和调制格式退化。结果表明，两种切换方向存在根本性不对称，1+1保护优于SBPP，并提出了缓解策略和规划建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着空心光纤从实验室走向实际部署，运营商网络中必然出现HCF与SMF混合的情况。传统保护切换方法在同质SMF网络中已成熟，但在异质光纤网络中面临新的挑战，如色散不连续、信噪比突变等问题，亟需系统性研究。

Method: 采用蒙特卡洛模拟方法，在6个参考拓扑（1602个节点对）上随机分配每链路光纤类型，对比分析1+1专用保护和SBPP两种架构在不同HCF部署比例下的性能表现，包括色散步长、GSNR惩罚、调制格式降级等指标，并进行了跨光纤极端情况分析。

Result: 50% HCF部署时，平均色散步长4000-22000 ps/nm，GSNR惩罚1.6-3.1 dB，38-59%节点对需要调制格式降级。HCF→SMF切换色散步长翻倍、GSNR惩罚约10 dB，而SMF→HCF切换GSNR惩罚为负值。SBPP在稀疏拓扑中比1+1保护色散步长高7%、降级多4个百分点。满HCF部署时容量保持率达85-99%。

Conclusion: 混合HCF/SMF网络中保护切换存在显著的方向不对称性；1+1专用保护整体优于SBPP；提出了DSP预加载、频谱预均衡等缓解策略；建议在实际混合部署中优先采用1+1保护架构。

Abstract: Hollow-core fibers (HCF) are transitioning from laboratory curiosities to production-deployed infrastructure, with cloud providers operating thousands of kilometers of hollow-core links. As operators upgrade their networks, working and protection paths will inevitably traverse different fiber types, creating a class of protection switching challenges absent in homogeneous single-mode fiber networks. This article provides a comprehensive overview of these challenges and presents a comparative analysis of protection switching under two architectures - 1+1 dedicated and shared backup path protection (SBPP) - in hybrid hollow-core and single-mode fiber networks. Using Monte Carlo simulation with random per-link fiber assignment across six reference topologies (1,602 node pairs), we quantify chromatic dispersion (CD) steps, generalized signal-to-noise ratio (GSNR) penalties, and modulation-format degradation for both architectures. At 50% HCF deployment mean CD steps range from 4,000 to 22,000 ps/nm, with GSNR penalties of 1.6-3.1 dB and 38-59% of node pairs requiring modulation downgrade under 1+1 protection. A complementary cross-fiber extreme analysis reveals that the two switching directions are fundamentally asymmetric: HCF-to-SMF switching doubles the CD step and inflicts about a 10 dB GSNR penalty while SMF-to-HCF switching delivers a negative GSNR penalty (the protection path is higher quality than the working path). SBPP shows up to 7% higher CD steps and 4 percentage points more downgrade in sparsely connected topologies due to its greedy shortest-first path selection. Capacity retention improves with HCF penetration for both architectures, reaching 85-99% at full HCF deployment. We present mitigation strategies including DSP pre-loading, spectral pre-equalization, and network planning guidelines, concluding that 1+1 dedicated protection is preferable to SBPP for hybrid deployments.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [476] [Balanced Workforce: Governance-by-Design for Privacy-Preserving Inter-Firm Workforce Leasing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20732)
*Melody Amaizu,Martin Stojkovski,Ariton Verush*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为BWLS的治理-by-design框架，用于隐私保护的跨企业劳动力租赁。该框架通过本地连接器与最小化中央协调层，实现企业间临时人才共享，并整合了社会技术治理、企业架构、商业模式设计、e3value价值交换建模和隐私设计原则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 项目型企业常面临技能短缺与员工闲置并存的问题，而传统招聘、外包和临时派遣模式存在法律、伦理、组织及数据治理风险，亟需一种受治理的跨企业劳动力租赁方案。

Method: 提出BWLS框架，包括系统概念、利益相关者模型、流程阶段、架构、商业模式、价值网络，并整合隐私设计、角色访问控制、数据最小化、合同保障、争议处理等机制。

Result: 提供了一个结构化的设计框架和设计工件，包括法律、伦理和运营风险分析，但未提供部署结果或实证验证。

Conclusion: 劳动力租赁平台不应仅设计为市场，而需纳入同意机制、可追溯性、访问控制等治理要素。该框架为未来受治理的数字劳动力基础设施研究提供了基础，可通过专家评审、研讨会、原型测试等方式进一步评估。

Abstract: Workforce demand is uneven across organizations. Project-based companies may simultaneously face skill shortages in one unit while other firms hold underutilized employees with relevant expertise. Conventional hiring, contracting, and temporary agency models address parts of this problem, but they also create legal, ethical, organizational, and data-governance risks. This paper reframes a seminar project called Balanced Workforce into a governance-by-design framework for privacy-preserving inter-firm workforce leasing. The proposed Balanced Workforce Leasing Service (BWLS) enables companies to list temporary talent availability, discover anonymized skill profiles, negotiate assignments, and document agreements through locally deployed connectors and a minimal central coordination layer. The framework combines socio-technical governance, enterprise architecture, business model design, e3value-based value exchange modeling, and privacy-by-design principles. The paper presents the system concept, stakeholder model, process phases, architecture, business model, value network, and legal, ethical, and operational risk analysis. It argues that workforce leasing platforms should not be designed only as marketplaces. They require consent mechanisms, traceability, role-based access control, data minimization, contractual safeguards, dispute handling, and institutional accountability. The contribution is a structured framework and design artifact for future research on governed digital labor infrastructures. The paper does not claim deployment results or empirical validation; instead, it provides a design framework that can be evaluated through expert review, stakeholder workshops, prototype testing, and regulatory analysis.

</details>


### [477] [A Topology-Aware, Memory-Centric Architecture that Separates Root-Cause Derivation from Root-Cause Explanation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20758)
*Momil Seedat*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了OPS CORTEX，一个多智能体运维原型系统，核心创新是"运维记忆"——将系统正常行为、服务依赖和历史故障持久化存储为结构化四层记忆，将根因定位（基于依赖图与阈值时序）与解释（利用LLM）分离，解决微服务故障检测容易但解释困难的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前微服务部署中故障易检测但难解释：告警泛滥、仪表盘激增，而理解服务关系的工程师被消耗在重构监控系统已丢弃的上下文信息上。作者认为自治运维缺失的关键不是更好的异常检测器或更大的语言模型，而是运维记忆。

Method: 构建OPS CORTEX多智能体原型，将运维记忆组织为四个层级；根因定位基于学习到的依赖图与阈值越界时间顺序确定性计算；LLM仅用于解释、确认和推荐，基于系统已汇总的证据。用两个生产级级联故障案例设计动机，在8个可注入故障场景的电商基准上验证。

Result: 在8个可注入故障场景的电商基准上进行验证，表明该架构能有效处理级联故障的诊断与解释。

Conclusion: 自治运维的关键不在于更强的检测或更大的模型，而在于构建结构化的运维记忆，并将根因定位与解释两个任务解耦，前者用确定性方法保证可靠，后者用LLM提供可读性解释。

Abstract: Modern microservice deployments fail in ways that are easy to detect and hard to explain. When a fault propagates along service dependencies, alerts fire in floods, dashboards multiply, and the scarce resource, an engineer who understands how the services relate, is consumed reconstructing context that the monitoring stack discarded. We argue that the missing ingredient in autonomous operations is not a better anomaly detector or a larger language model, but operational memory: a persistent, structured representation of how a system normally behaves, how its parts depend on one another, and how it has failed before. We present O PS C ORTEX, a working multi-agent prototype that organizes this memory into four tiers and uses it to separate two tasks the field usually conflates: deriving a root cause and explaining it. Root cause is computed deterministically from a learned dependency graph and the temporal ordering of threshold crossings; a large language model (LLM) is then asked only to explain, confirm, and recommend, using evidence the system has already assembled. We motivate the design with two documented production cascading failures, review representative literature on observability, anomaly detection, graph-based localization, and LLM-assisted diagnosis, and show how each architectural choice maps directly to a failure mode those incidents exhibit. The prototype is validated on an instrumented e-commerce benchmark with eight injectable failure scenarios.

</details>


### [478] [Integrating Large Language Model Agents with Digital Twins for Industrial Autonomous Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20761)
*Yuchen Xia*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出一个三层次框架，将大语言模型、数字孪生和自动化系统集成，通过TPSR模型和四种LLM角色实现自适应、目标导向的工业自动化，实验证明可提升任务可执行性和正确性，但存在数字表示依赖和计算开销等局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统工业自动化系统基于固定逻辑规则，无法自主适应动态变化的生产环境，缺乏将自适应和可泛化推理能力集成到异构组件和动态场景中的系统化方法。

Method: 提出三层次框架（LLM+数字孪生+自动化系统），引入TPSR模型将用户任务转化为可执行流程，定义四种LLM角色（流程编排、服务匹配、数字资源生成、智能体即服务），采用设计科学研究方法通过五项同行评议研究开发与验证。

Result: 案例研究和原型验证表明：自适应任务规划、事件驱动控制、基于仿真的参数化、数字模型生成等方面表现良好，实现了高任务可执行性、指令正确性和内容生成准确性，同时减少了人工工作量。

Conclusion: 该框架成功将LLM推理集成到工业自动化系统，提升了适应性和可用性。局限在于依赖准确的数字表示、LLM计算开销大，以及安全关键场景仍需人工干预。

Abstract: Industrial automation is being transformed by digitalization and the increasing use of cyber-physical systems. Modern production environments require greater adaptability, faster reconfiguration, and more intuitive human-machine interaction. However, traditional rule-based systems rely on fixed logic and cannot autonomously adapt to changing conditions.
