*Ethan Knights,Christopher Conlan,Temilorun Gbolahan,Stephen Waterman,Gurpreet Muctor*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出GRAIDES——一个轻量级开源数据模型，用于统一不同供应商的生成式AI评估数据，通过标准化数据建模实现可重复的AI性能与安全基准测试。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI的评估数据分散在各系统中，结构不统一且难以比较，导致信任建立缺乏可衡量的证据支持。

Method: 提出GRAIDES数据模型，提供代码蓝图、架构设计和统计评估指南，并在Westminster市议会的AI目录中进行了案例验证。

Result: 案例研究展示了测量人机对齐的能力，包括检测评估者之间的系统性分歧。

Conclusion: 将评估视为数据建模问题，GRAIDES为生成式AI系统提供了一致且可复现的基准测试、调优和保障路径。

Abstract: Trust in the application of generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) relies on well-governed measurable evidence of performance and safety. In practice, however, evaluation data is often fragmented across systems, inconsistently structured and difficult to compare. We introduce the Generative Responsible AI Data Evaluation Schema (GRAIDES) as a lightweight open-source data model for centralising AI observability across popular vendors. Practical blueprints for code, architecture and statistical evaluation are shared as guidance about how to approach generative system assurance at the organisational level. Illustrative case study results are reported from Westminster City Council's AI catalogue with a focus on measuring human-model alignment including detecting systematic disagreement between evaluators. By framing evaluations as a data modelling problem, GRAIDES provides a practical pathway toward more consistent and reproducible benchmarking, tuning and assurance activities for generative AI systems.

</details>


### [588] [AutoACSL: Synthesizing ACSL Specifications by Integrating LLMs with CPG-Based Static Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20969)
*Han Zhou,Yu Luo,Dianxiang Xu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: AutoACSL框架将LLM与代码属性图(CPG)的语义特征相结合，实现了C程序ACSL形式规约的自动化生成，在604个程序上达到98%的规约生成成功率和96%的完整证明率，相比纯代码基线提升24.7%-51.7%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: C程序形式规约的生成依赖人工编写，既费力又需要专业知识，现有LLM方法缺乏语义深度，生成的规约常不可验证或不完整。

Method: AutoACSL框架：首先通过CPG静态分析提取算术运算、循环/递归结构、返回值传播等语义特征，编码为结构化提示；然后LLM基于提示生成行为规约和运行时错误约束；最后通过Frama-C/WP验证候选规约，形成反馈驱动迭代合成循环。

Result: 在604个程序上评估：规约生成成功率98%，完整证明率96%；相比纯代码基线，在GPT-o4 Mini、GPT-5.2、Grok-4.1、Gemini-3四个LLM上完整证明率提升24.7%-51.7%。

Conclusion: 将LLM与CPG静态分析相结合，能显著提升自动ACSL规约合成的鲁棒性和验证有效性。

Abstract: Generating formal specifications for C programs remains a challenge in formal verification due to the manual effort, expertise, and semantic precision required. While recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) offer promise in automating specification synthesis, current approaches often lack semantic depth and produce unverifiable or incomplete contracts. To address these limitations, we introduce AutoACSL, a novel framework that integrates LLM prompting with semantic features extracted from Code Property Graphs (CPGs). AutoACSL performs static analyses to extract key semantic elements, including arithmetic operations, loop and recursion structures, and return value propagation, which are encoded into structured prompts. These prompts enable the LLM not only to generate normal behavioral specifications but also to include constraints that prevent inputs leading to runtime errors. AutoACSL employs a feedback-driven synthesis loop, where candidate specifications are verified using Frama-C/WP and refined iteratively until verification succeeds or a termination condition is met. Evaluated on 604 programs drawn from diverse datasets, AutoACSL achieves a 98% specification generation success ratio and a 96% full proof ratio when paired with Gemini-3. Compared to a code-only baseline, AutoACSL improves the full proof ratio by 24.7% to 51.7% across four LLMs (GPT-o4 Mini, GPT-5.2, Grok-4.1, and Gemini-3), demonstrating that integrating large language models with CPG-based static analysis substantially enhances both generation robustness and verification effectiveness for automated ACSL specification synthesis.

</details>


### [589] [How Should Agents Read Demonstrations? Hierarchical Structure Beats Flat Action Logs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20978)
*Honjar Xing,Jefferson Lin,Henry Lieberman*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究如何组织“编程通过演示”（PbD）录制的动作日志以提升LLM Agent的任务执行质量。实验发现，将动作序列分组为带标签的分层子目标，能在自然语言任务描述模糊时显著提升通过率（76.7%→90.7%），而扁平化演示提升有限。消融实验表明，子目标分组是核心因素，前置/后置条件和参数注释无额外收益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PbD让非程序员也能为LLM Agent编程序化知识，但录制的扁平动作日志如何组织才能提升Agent的规划质量，是一个尚未明确且影响显著的设计问题。

Method: 提出了将录制的动作序列分组为带标签的分层子目标的结构化方法，并在85个Web自动化任务上进行了受控实验，对比了零样本基线、扁平演示和四种不同结构的分层演示格式。

Result: 在43个模糊描述的NL任务中，分层演示通过率从76.7%提升至90.7%（p=0.034）；在42个精确描述任务中，所有格式均无显著提升。消融实验显示仅子目标分组有效。

Conclusion: 建议PbD管道及其他为LLM Agent提供程序化上下文的系统，将动作序列分割为命名的子目标组，而非呈现扁平步骤列表。

Abstract: Programming by Demonstration (PbD) offers a human-centered way to author procedural knowledge for LLM agents: users communicate what they want by showing rather than by writing prompts or code, making agent authoring accessible to non-programmers. The natural output of a PbD recording is a flat action log, but how this log is organized before being passed to the agent is an open design question with significant consequences for plan quality. We propose grouping recorded actions into labeled, hierarchical subgoals and evaluate the effect of this organizational structure in a controlled experiment. Across 85 web automation tasks, we compare a zero-shot baseline against four demonstration formats that share identical action sequences but differ in structure. On 43 natural-language tasks with vague descriptions, hierarchically grouped demonstrations improve pass rates from 76.7\% to 90.7\% (paired permutation test $p{=}0.034$; win-loss 6:0), while flat demonstrations show a smaller, non-significant improvement. On 42 tasks with precise descriptions, no format provides any benefit, confirming that the hierarchical advantage arises specifically when descriptions leave procedural details ambiguous. Ablation shows that subgoal grouping alone drives the effect: preconditions, postconditions, and parameter annotations add no measurable benefit. These results offer a concrete design recommendation for PbD pipelines and, more broadly, for any system that feeds procedural context to an LLM agent: segment action sequences into named subgoal groups rather than presenting flat step lists.

</details>


### [590] [BioInsight: Multi-Agent Orchestration for Interactive Biomedical Knowledge Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20997)
*Jieyi Wang,Bingxuan Li,Nanyi Jiang,Desong Meng,Zirui Fan,Yuxin Guo,Jiayu Liu,Kunlun Zhu,Eddie Yang,Xiusi Chen,Pan Lu,Bingxin Zhao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: BioInsight是一个多智能体系统，将生物医学报告从静态文本转向交互式、证据中心的可视化界面，支持研究人员对蛋白质信号证据的探查、不确定性评估、机制比较和假设优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物医学研究者越来越多地使用AI生成的分析报告，但静态输出不足以支持研究决策，用户需要查看证据、评估不确定性、比较机制和优化假设。

Method: BioInsight是一个多智能体系统。输入为疾病名、蛋白质关联表和可选的队列元数据。通过类型化中间工件（排序通路、文献证据包、蛋白质推理笔记、引文报告、仪表盘模式和交互界面）组织证据。将证据检索与机制推理解耦，通过确定性组件规范化引文，将结构化证据同时用于报告和交互界面生成。

Result: 在标准化生物医学QA、蛋白质功能推理和端到端证据综合任务上达到了最优表现。

Conclusion: 生物医学AI系统应从纯文本和静态报告转向保留溯源信息的交互式证据工件。

Abstract: Biomedical researchers increasingly use AI-generated analyses and reports to interpret protein-level signals, but static outputs are often insufficient for research decision-making, where users need to inspect evidence, assess uncertainty, compare mechanisms, and refine hypotheses. We present \textsc{BioInsight}, a multi-agent system that moves from static biomedical report generation to interactive evidence-centered interactive interface generation. Given a disease name, a protein association table, and optional cohort metadata, BioInsight organizes disease-specific evidence through typed intermediate artifacts, including ranked pathways, literature evidence packets, protein-level reasoning notes, citation-grounded reports, dashboard schemas, and rendered interactive interfaces. The system decomposes evidence retrieval from mechanistic reasoning, normalizes citations through deterministic components, and converts the same structured evidence used in the report into an interactive interface. We evaluate BioInsight on standardized biomedical QA, challenging protein-function reasoning, and end-to-end biomedical evidence synthesis. Results show that BioInsight achieves best, and suggest that biomedical AI systems should move beyond text-only and static reports toward provenance-preserving, interactive evidence artifacts.

</details>


### [591] [Building Agent Harnesses for Scientific Curation from Multimodal Sources](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21005)
*Sheng Zhang,Qin Liu,Renqian Luo,Shufang Xie,Reuben Tan,Sean Hayes,Gregory Bryman,Wendong Ge,Roxy Zhang,Oluwaseun Egbelowo,Kelly Yee,Hoifung Poon*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Beaver智能体框架，从多模态科学文献中自动提取结构化信息，通过分阶段工作流、多模态证据工具和溯源追踪，在科学数据策展任务上显著超越前沿智能体（GRAS分数提升23个绝对点）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学发现工作流依赖从文献中结构化策展数据，但现有智能体难以处理文本、表格、图表等多模态证据的分散分布，且最终记录需要跨多个证据片段的推理而非简单复制。

Method: 提出Beaver智能体框架，包含四个组件：前沿智能体、多模态证据工具、任务脚手架（分阶段可审计工作流）和工件驱动的自动研究（迭代的评估-诊断-修正循环），通过持久化运行工件暴露阶段局部失败并指导框架更新。

Result: Beaver在GRAS指标上达到81.0，相比前沿智能体提升23个绝对点。消融实验表明任务脚手架、多模态证据工具和溯源追踪均有显著贡献，属性级分析显示在需要跨模态推理和归一化的高价值属性上收益最大。

Conclusion: 对于需要多模态证据的科学文献策展，框架设计是决定智能体性能的核心因素。

Abstract: Scientific discovery workflows often depend on structured curation from the literature. This is difficult for current agents because the key evidence is scattered across long text, dense tables, and figures, and the final records often require reasoning across multiple evidence fragments rather than copying a single span. We study scientific curation from multimodal sources and introduce Beaver, an agent harness that extracts structured information from scientific papers while preserving provenance to the supporting evidence. Beaver combines a frontier agent with multimodal evidence tooling, task scaffolding, and artifact-grounded autoresearch. These components turn curation into a staged, auditable workflow and enable an iterative evaluate--diagnose--revise loop, where persistent run artifacts expose stage-localized failures and guide harness updates. Experiments show that Beaver reaches 81.0 on Gold-Referenced Attribute Score (GRAS), an attribute-level measure of agreement with gold curated records, outperforming frontier agents by over 23 absolute points. Ablations show that task scaffolding, multimodal evidence tooling, and provenance traces each contribute meaningfully to performance, while attribute-level analysis shows the largest gains on high-value attributes that require cross-modal reasoning and normalization. These results show that, for scientific curation from papers with multimodal evidence, harness design is a central determinant of agent performance.

</details>


### [592] [Closure of Self-Determining System Based on Causal and Constitutive Relations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21010)
*Yoshiyuki Ohmura,Earnest Kota Carr,Yasuo Kuniyoshi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出通过因果-构成循环的闭合来定义系统边界，从而解决自决定系统中边界界定与因果循环等难题，并指出该定义需要双变量构成关系，最终形成双过程组织。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有系统边界定义（如“闭合”概念）在处理外部原因和循环因果时存在挑战，亟需一种能明确区分系统内外部因果关系的边界界定方法。

Method: 引入两种非对称关系（因果关系与构成关系），提出系统边界可定义为由这两种关系形成的循环（因果-构成循环）的闭合。同时要求构成关系至少涉及两个独立变量，以避免还原为随附性，从而形成两个相互依赖的循环（双过程组织）。

Result: 通过约束构成关系，系统必然包含内部原因，满足自决定条件；双变量构成关系的引入避免了还原论问题，并自然导出了双过程组织结构。

Conclusion: 因果-构成循环闭合为系统边界提供了一种形式化定义，能够有效处理自决定系统中的边界与因果难题，且双变量构成关系保证了系统的非还原性。

Abstract: A self-determining system is defined as one in which causes originating within the system influence the system itself. This definition raises the question of how to specify system boundaries. Although the concept of "closure" is commonly used for this purpose, defining boundaries solely in terms of causal relations introduce challenges, such as how to handle external causes and circular causality. To address this issue, we introduce two types of asymmetric relations: causal and constitutive. We propose that system boundaries can be defined as closures of loops formed by these relations, referred to as causal-constitutive loops. By constraining constitutive relations, the resulting system necessarily includes internal causes and thereby satisfies self-determination. Furthermore, to prevent reduction to supervenience, constitutive relations must involve at least two independent variables. This minimal requirement leads to two interdependent loops, which implies a dual-process organization.

</details>


### [593] [Agentic Time Machine as an Infrastructure for Future-Event Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21013)
*Jingyi Chai,Bingyang Zheng,Xiangrui Liu,Hao Lu,Zihang Zhou,Tianchen Wang,Kemeng Zhang,Siheng Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Agentic Time Machine (TM)，一个通过过滤截止日后内容重建历史网络状态的评估基础设施，并在此基础上设计了一个规划器-求解器-聚合器多智能体框架，在保持环境真实性的同时实现了高效的离线评估，在FutureX等基准上取得了最优结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM预测评估存在效率与真实性的根本矛盾：实时评估反馈慢，而离线回放则牺牲了环境保真度（静态冻结数据库）。作者旨在构建一个既快速又贴近真实部署环境的评估方案。

Method: 1) 提出Agentic Time Machine (TM)，通过过滤截止日后内容重建任意历史时刻的网络状态。2) 提出规划器-求解器-聚合器多智能体框架：规划器将问题拆解为多角度分析，求解器并行收集证据，聚合器整合结果输出最终预测。

Result: TM离线分数与FutureX实时分数高度相关，验证了其可靠性。在FutureX-Past和Polymarket上，该框架优于闭卷、工具增强和自一致性基线。在FutureX实时榜单上，连续四周平均排名第一，截至6月17日位居八周总榜第一。

Conclusion: Agentic Time Machine有效解决了评估效率与保真度的权衡，所提出的多智能体框架在多个预测任务中达到了SOTA性能，为LLM预测智能体的评估与优化提供了可行的标准化方案。

Abstract: Forecasting future events is a critical challenge for large language model (LLM) agents, spanning domains from elections and monetary policy to financial markets. However, evaluating progress on this task presents a fundamental trade-off between efficiency and environment fidelity. While live evaluation benchmarks suffer from an inherently slow feedback loop, existing retrospective replays typically restrict agents to static, pre-frozen databases that sacrifice the environmental realism of actual deployments. To tackle this issue, we introduce Agentic Time Machine (TM), an infrastructure that approximately reconstructs the web state at any chosen past time by filtering post-cutoff content. Leveraging this evaluation infrastructure, we further propose a planner-solver-aggregator multi-agent framework that breaks each question into diverse analytical angles, gathers evidence in parallel, and combines the results into a single forecast. Experiments show that offline scores under TM correlate strongly with live FutureX scores, validating that TM offers a fast and reliable sandbox for forecasting-agent evaluation. On FutureX-Past and Polymarket evaluated under TM, our framework achieves the highest score among strong closed-book, tool-augmented, and self-consistency baselines. On the official FutureX live leaderboard, our system achieves the best average rank over four consecutive weeks, including 1st place in May Week 1. As of June 17, it also ranks 1st on FutureX's official eight-week overall leaderboard.

</details>


### [594] [The AI Evaluability Gap: The Missing Layer for Managing Risk and Sustaining Value](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21015)
*Vishal Srivastava,Tanmay Sah*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AI可评估性差距概念，指出当前AI治理过度关注系统属性而忽视证据基础，并引入可评估性框架，通过区分运营认证与投资认证来弥合这一差距，以实现风险管理和价值维持。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 组织在部署AI时面临风险管理和价值维持两大治理挑战，二者都依赖于证据的充分性，但现有治理方法主要关注系统属性（如安全、公平等），忽视了支撑这些决策所需的证据基础，存在类别错误。

Method: 提出"可评估性"概念，将其定义为系统生成、维护和更新充分证据的能力；将治理决策形式化为置信度函数Conf(D|E)；识别证据充分性的六个属性（可观察性、可归因性、可干预性、可验证性、校准性、时间有效性）；区分运营认证（依赖结构性证据）和投资认证（依赖因果证据）。

Result: 建立了可评估性框架，明确了证据充分性是AI治理缺失的一层，并区分了两种不同类型的认证决策及其所需的证据类型。

Conclusion: 关闭AI可评估性差距是管理风险和维持价值的先决条件，证据充分性应成为AI治理的核心组成部分。

Abstract: Organizations deploying AI face two fundamental governance challenges: managing AI risk and sustaining AI value. Both depend on evidence whose sufficiency cannot be taken for granted. We call the shared underlying challenge the AI Evaluability Gap: the condition in which organizations lack sufficient evidence to support high-confidence governance decisions regarding either risk or value.
  We argue that this gap reflects a category error in current practice. Existing governance approaches focus primarily on properties of systems, such as safety, fairness, reliability, compliance, and value, while paying comparatively little attention to the evidentiary foundations required to justify decisions about those properties. We further argue that AI governance encompasses both operational decisions regarding whether a system may operate and investment decisions regarding whether it merits continued organizational resources.
  To address this problem, we introduce Evaluability, defined as the capability of a system to generate, maintain, and renew evidence sufficient to support high-confidence governance decisions over time. We formalize governance decisions as functions of calibrated confidence Conf(D|E) and identify six properties of evaluable evidence: observability, attributability, intervenability, verifiability, calibration, and temporal validity.
  The framework distinguishes Operational Certification, which relies primarily on structural evidence to justify deployment decisions, from Investment Certification, which relies primarily on causal evidence to justify continued resource allocation. We argue that evidence sufficiency is a missing layer of AI governance and that closing the AI Evaluability Gap is a prerequisite for both managing risk and sustaining value in AI-enabled organizations.

</details>


### [595] [Negative Knowledge as Failure-aware Shared Memory for AutoResearch](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21024)
*Hanchun Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出一种"负知识记忆层"——将AI科研系统中的失败尝试转化为结构化记录，让后续研究代理明确采纳或拒绝这些记录。实验表明该方法在相同任务重试和跨任务科研中均优于基线，且能迁移到不同PDE问题中提升效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI辅助研究系统会产生大量失败尝试，但这些失败很少被持久化、共享为知识资产。现有系统往往将失败当作调试信息或压缩记忆处理，缺乏结构化、可复用的负知识管理机制。

Method: 提出负知识记忆层：(1) 策展代理将每次失败尝试转化为有界、类型化的记录存入共享库；(2) 下游研究代理在提出下一个实验前明确采纳或拒绝这些记录。在ScienceAgentBench和两个非线性数学物理PDE问题上评估。

Result: 负知识层在相同任务重试和跨任务科研中均优于AutoResearch基线，且使用更少token；代理借助负知识库能解决所有基线都无法解决的PDE系统新任务；之前的负知识库可迁移至不同PDE问题并提升AutoResearch性能。

Conclusion: 结构化负知识是一种应被明确维护的知识资产，而不仅仅是记忆压缩或调试工具。它应与正知识并列，作为AI科学研究中集体记忆的基础设施。

Abstract: AI-assisted research systems generate many failed attempts, but those failures rarely become a durable, shared knowledge asset. We propose a negative knowledge memory layer: a curator agent converts each failed attempt into a bounded, typed record in a shared bank, and a downstream research agent explicitly adopts or rejects those records before proposing its next experiment. We evaluate this layer in two settings: same-task retry on ScienceAgentBench and cross-task scientific research on two nonlinear math-physics PDE problems. The negative knowledge layer outperforms vanilla AutoResearch baselines while using fewer tokens; agents with the negative knowledge bank solve new tasks that all baselines fail to solve in PDE systems research. We also show that the previous negative knowledge bank can transfer and enhance AutoResearch on different PDE problems. These results suggest that structured negative knowledge is a knowledge asset that should be explicitly maintained in broader AI-engaged scientific research beyond a memory-compression or debugging aid, alongside positive findings, as a collective infrastructure for scientific memory. Code is available at https://github.com/hch-wang/Negative_Knowledge.

</details>


### [596] [Coherence Under Commitment: Probing Generalization and Vacuous Memorization in LLM Logical Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21083)
*Noor Islam S. Mohammad,Mahmudul Hasan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出CUC（承诺下的连贯性）双查询评估范式，通过承诺分数、确定性激发协议和三分类框架，揭示LLM在逻辑推理中可通过系统性弃权实现虚假连贯性，实验表明仅评估连贯性会误导模型排名。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM逻辑推理评估仅关注连贯性（一致性），忽略了模型通过"弃权"（既不肯定也不否定）来规避矛盾、虚假达到连贯性的问题。这种真空连贯性缺乏实用价值，但现有指标无法区分。

Method: 提出CUC范式：(1) 承诺分数c(φ)=p(φ)+p(¬φ)量化模型对决定性结果的概率分配；(2) 通过归一化YES/NO对数概率的确定性激发协议消除采样方差；(3) 建立True/False/Uncertain三分类框架，将连贯性-承诺权衡转化为可量化指标。

Result: 在204个FOLIO样本上测试4个1B-3B开源模型，发现明晰边界：Qwen2.5-3B近乎零矛盾但覆盖率仅7.4%，TinyLlama-1.1B覆盖率79.4%但每个样本均违反一致性。传统连贯性评估会错误排名弃权模型第一，CUC揭示其空洞性。该模式在LogiQA v2上具有高泛化性（ρ=0.97）。

Conclusion: 逻辑推理评估必须同时报告连贯性和非空洞承诺，仅关注连贯性会严重高估弃权模型。CUC为标准化评估提供了有效工具。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) deployed for logical reasoning in knowledge-intensive domains exhibit a subtle but critical failure: coherence can be vacuously achieved through systematic abstention. A model that withholds commitment to either entailment or refutation satisfies negation consistency while providing no utility. We introduce Coherence Under Commitment (CUC), a dual-query evaluation paradigm that jointly measures consistency and decisiveness. CUC contributes three innovations: (1) a commitment score $c(\varphi) = p(\varphi) + p(\lnot\varphi)$ quantifying probability mass allocated to decisive outcomes; (2) a \textbf{deterministic elicitation protocol} via normalized YES/NO log probabilities, eliminating sampling variance; and (3) a 3-way decision framework (True/False/Uncertain) operationalizing the coherence-commitment trade-off into metrics. Experiments on four open-weight LLMs (1B-3B) across 204 FOLIO examples expose a sharp frontier. Qwen2.5-3B achieves near-zero contradiction ($\mathbb{E}[v_{\mathrm{neg}}]{=}0.025$) but only $7.4\%$ coverage, while TinyLlama-1.1B reaches $79.4\%$ coverage with violations on every example. Coherence-only evaluation would rank the abstaining model first; CUC exposes this as vacuous, and the frontier generalizes to LogiQA~v2 ($ρ{=}0.97$). We argue that evaluation must report both coherence and non-vacuous commitment and release a toolkit for standardized assessment.

</details>


### [597] [Repeated post-training is not Self-improving: Diagnosing Scientific Amnesia in Continual DPO Pipelines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21089)
*Jianzhe Lin,Fei Wang,Xiaolin Li,Rajeshkumar Golani,Jubin Chheda*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文发现工业LLM团队在持续DPO训练中，模型可能保留旧行为但遗忘"如何训练下一轮"的方法论知识（称为"科学健忘症"），并提供了诊断工具、基准测试和五种策略的比较研究，结论是问题真实存在且干预效果高度依赖实验设置。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业LLM团队在持续DPO训练中，模型虽未发生经典灾难性遗忘，但会遗忘关于"如何训练下一轮任务"的方法论知识——即科学健忘症。本文旨在将这一实践直觉转化为可测量的工业问题。

Method: (i) 开发了科学健忘症诊断套件；(ii) 构建了基于程序的流水线，在Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct上链式执行FSDP分片的DPO检查点；(iii) 创建了包含30个campaign的HumanEval子域基准；(iv) 对比研究了五种策略：随机记忆、基于规则的调度、仅检索记忆、热启动贝叶斯优化、以及MSCL（元科学记忆与推理器）。

Result: 在单种子5条件×3步的实验中，5种策略中有4种（包括MSCL）在步级peak pass@1上退化，仅保守的规则调度策略提升。后续实验显示：在异构链中MSCL是唯一提升的候选；在多种子同质扫描中，仅检索记忆平均Delta最佳，但所有策略对之间无统计显著差异。

Conclusion: 科学健忘症在类生产环境的持续DPO流水线中真实可观测，且干预策略的结论高度依赖链式训练的设置、评估器设计和种子覆盖范围。本文贡献在于诊断本身，而非声称MSCL解决了问题。

Abstract: Industrial LLM teams often ship behavior updates by repeatedly DPO-training a base model on sequences of related preference-data campaigns. The dominant failure mode in this regime is not always classical catastrophic forgetting: a pipeline may preserve previously learned behaviors while still failing to accumulate reusable methodological knowledge about how to train the next campaign. We call this failure mode scientific amnesia. This paper turns that practitioner intuition into a measurable industrial problem. We contribute: (i) a diagnostic suite for amnesia, (ii) a Program-based pipeline that chains FSDP-sharded DPO checkpoints across Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct runs, (iii) a 30-campaign HumanEval subdomain benchmark, and (iv) a comparative diagnostic study of five strategy proposers: random memory, rule-based scheduling, retrieval-only memory, warm-start Bayesian optimization, and MSCL, a meta-scientific memory and reasoner candidate. Across a single-seed 5-condition * 3-step real-LM chain, 4 of 5 candidates degrade in step-level peak pass@1, including MSCL; only the deliberately conservative rule-based schedule improves. Follow-up pilots qualify rather than overturn this finding: in a heterogeneous chain, MSCL is the only completed candidate that improves, whereas in a small multi-seed homogeneous sweep, retrieval-only has the best mean Delta and no pairwise candidate gap is statistically distinguishable. The contribution is therefore diagnostic, not a claim that MSCL solves the problem: scientific amnesia is observable in a production-like continual-DPO pipeline, and conclusions about interventions depend sharply on chain regime, evaluator design, and seed coverage.

</details>


### [598] [Self-Improvement Can Self-Regress: The Rise-and-Collapse Failure Mode of LLM Self-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21090)
*Jianzhe Lin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文发现，在代码强化学习（REINFORCE）中，模型性能会出现“先升后崩”现象：pass@1在几十步梯度内达到峰值，然后急剧下降，甚至接近零。这不是跨任务灾难性遗忘，而是同一任务内策略过度优化。作者比较了三类控制方法：CARE（跨阶段记忆机制）、ES（早停规则）和GRPO（组相对奖励归一化）。效果取决于模型规模：3B模型上CARE最佳（pass@1从4.9%提升至9.5%），7B模型上ES和GRPO更优（ES达22.2%，GRPO达20.7%）。GRPO能提升下限但无法消除崩塌，结合ES效果也不稳定。Gemma-3-4B上观察到相同现象，说明问题具有普遍性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有强化学习后训练中，模型在代码任务上会出现性能先上升后崩溃的现象，且传统KL约束和EWC方法无法阻止。作者希望理解这一现象的根源，并探索在哪个层面（阶段间/阶段内/更新规则）加入控制能有效缓解性能崩溃。

Method: 使用Qwen-2.5-3B和7B模型，在编程竞赛任务上以二进制CodeGrader为奖励，进行10个连续20步的REINFORCE训练阶段。对比三种控制方法：CARE（跨阶段记忆机制，含能力后验、传输门和回归感知信念修正）、ES（阶段内早停，回滚到峰值检查点并设置下一步预算为peak_step+3）、GRPO（组相对奖励归一化）。

Result: Qwen-2.5-3B上，CARE v2将端到端pass@1从4.9%提升至9.5%，4/5种子提升。Qwen-2.5-7B上，CARE达13.8%（与REINFORCE的11.8%持平），ES达22.2%，GRPO达20.7%。GRPO提升了7B模型的下限（约17点峰谷差仍存在），GRPO+ES效果不稳定（均值17.0%但置信区间很宽）。Gemma-3-4B验证了现象普遍性。

Conclusion: 代码强化学习中的性能崩塌是同一任务内策略过度优化的结果，而非跨任务遗忘。没有一种控制方法在所有规模上通用：小模型需要更激进的跨阶段记忆干预（CARE），大模型则受益于阶段内早停（ES）或奖励归一化（GRPO）。GRPO能提高下限但无法消除崩塌，提示需要更细粒度的阶段内控制机制。

Abstract: Self-improvement can self-regress. In REINFORCE post-training for code, a model can quickly improve on its optimized metric and then collapse within the same training campaign. We study this in a controlled multi-seed testbed using Qwen-2.5-3B and Qwen-2.5-7B, trained on competitive-programming tasks with binary CodeGrader reward across 10 sequential 20-step campaigns. Across campaigns, pass@1 shows a robust rise-then-collapse pattern: it peaks within tens of gradient steps and then falls back, sometimes to near zero. This is not cross-task catastrophic forgetting, but within-task policy over-optimization on a fixed distribution; KL- and EWC-style constraints do not prevent it.
  We ask where the control loop should sit. We compare three levels: CARE, a between-campaign memory mechanism with a capability posterior, transfer gate, and regression-aware belief revision; ES, a within-campaign early-stop rule that rolls forward the peak checkpoint and sets the next budget to peak_step+3; and GRPO, which changes the RL update using group-relative reward normalization.
  The answer is regime-dependent. On Qwen-2.5-3B, where naive REINFORCE is fragile, CARE v2 nearly doubles end-of-chain pass@1 from 4.9% to 9.5%, with paired bootstrap 95% CI [+0.4,+8.9] and gains in 4/5 seeds. On Qwen-2.5-7B, CARE reaches parity with naive REINFORCE, 13.8% vs. 11.8%, while ES reaches 22.2% [14.1,28.0]. Out-of-the-box GRPO reaches 20.7% [15.7,25.1], nearly matching REINFORCE+ES.
  GRPO raises the floor but does not remove the cliff. Its 7B gain mainly comes from better between-campaign carryover, while the within-campaign peak-to-end gap remains about 17 points under both REINFORCE and GRPO. GRPO+ES gives mixed evidence: 2/3 seeds improve, but one final cliff lowers the mean to 17.0% [0.0,28.1]. A Gemma-3-4B pilot shows the same signature, suggesting the phenomenon is not limited to Qwen.

</details>


### [599] [AgentRiskBOM: A Risk-Scoping Security Bill of Materials for Agentic AI Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21877)
*Srimonti Dutta,Akshata Kishore Moharir*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AgentRiskBOM，一种针对工具使用型AI代理的安全物料清单（BOM），通过增加运行时权限（如自主性、工具权限、内存、凭证范围等）字段，弥补现有SBOM/AIBOM/MLBOM在代理透明度方面的不足。在13个开源代理和52个风险场景上评估表明，AgentRiskBOM在能力覆盖（14/16 vs 1-2）、风险可见性（100% vs 10.5%-20.9%）及扩散检测（100%正确识别）上显著优于现有方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有物料清单（SBOM、AIBOM、MLBOM）能捕捉依赖、模型元数据和训练来源，但存在"代理透明度鸿沟"：缺乏对部署后代理能访问、记住、更改、委托什么以及事后可证明能力的结构化描述，即能力不透明性。

Method: 提出AgentRiskBOM，作为SBOM/AIBOM/MLBOM之上的增量层，新增运行时权限字段（自主性、工具权限、内存、凭证范围、审批关卡、审计信号、代理间通信、外部行为能力）。实现为JSON-schema工件，包含可复现语料库、风险场景、评分器、差异检测器、控制映射器和报告。

Result: 在13个开源代理（编码、RAG、多代理）和52个风险场景上评估：Schema验证全部通过；能力覆盖14/16（SBOM:1, AIBOM:1.5, MLBOM:2）；风险可见性100%（SBOM:10.5%, AIBOM:20.9%）；33次结构变异注入后差异检测器100%正确识别；两个评分器Spearman相关性0.73。

Conclusion: 代理AI安全需要在事故发生前拥有机器可读的权限与风险工件，AgentRiskBOM填补了这一空白，但阈值设定仍需人工校准。

Abstract: Agentic AI systems retrieve private context, invoke tools, write files, call external services, coordinate with other agents, and may act without human approval. Existing bill of materials artifacts improve transparency for dependencies, model metadata, and training provenance, but leave an agentic transparency gap: capability opacity, the absence of a structured account of what a deployed agent can access, remember, change, delegate, and prove afterward. This paper introduces AgentRiskBOM, a security BOM for risk-scoping tool-using AI agents. It is an additive layer over SBOM, AIBOM, and MLBOM artifacts, referencing them where authoritative while adding fields for runtime authority: autonomy, tool permissions, memory, credential scope, approval gates, audit signals, inter-agent communication, and external action capability. We implement AgentRiskBOM as a JSON-schema artifact with a reproducible corpus, risk scenarios, scorer, diff detector, control mapper, and reports. We evaluate AgentRiskBOM on 13 open-source agents spanning coding, RAG, and multi-agent archetypes, plus 52 risk scenarios across 14 categories. The schema validates all 13 corpus artifacts. Coverage analysis gives AgentRiskBOM a native-equivalent score of 14 across 16 capability dimensions, vs. 1 for SBOM, 1.5 for AIBOM and 2 for MLBOM. Across modeled risk categories, AgentRiskBOM exposes 100% risk-category visibility vs. 10.5% for SBOM-like and 20.9% for AIBOM-like views. To test agentic authority drift, we inject 33 structured deployment mutations; the diff detector identifies the correct change type for all mutations. A secondary penalty-based scorer yields a Spearman correlation of 0.73 with the primary scorer, supporting rank-level consistency while showing that thresholds require human calibration. The results show that agentic AI security needs a machine-readable authority-and-risk artifact before incidents occur.

</details>


### [600] [Answer Engineering: Local Trajectory Editing for Protocol-Constrained Decision Making in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21121)
*Victor Lavrenko,Anastasiia Molodnitskaia*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Answer Engineering，一种无需重新训练或修改模型权重的确定性运行时方法，通过在自回归生成过程中对可见推理轨迹进行局部规则引导干预，在SSNHL临床基准测试中将平衡准确率从42.0%提升至80.7%，同时揭示了规则覆盖范围、触发可靠性等局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在需要协议合规的关键领域（如临床诊疗）中，虽然能生成自信的回答，但往往产生不符合协议的无效答案，而现有方法如重新训练或全局搜索成本高昂且不具可审计性。因此需要一种高效、可审计的方法来确保协议的合规性。

Method: Answer Engineering：一种确定性运行时和作者层，在标准自回归生成过程中对可见推理轨迹应用局部规则引导的干预，无需重新训练、修改模型权重或进行全局搜索。该方法在SSNHL临床基准上进行评估，该基准涉及症状时机、Weber/Rinne音叉检查和耳镜检查结果的协议一致性解读。

Result: 无引导生成下SSNHL合规率为54.5%，引入逐步推理后降至25.1%（但传导性对照条件合规率从1.6%升至58.9%）；局部轨迹编辑将SSNHL合规率提升至83.5%，传导性病例合规率达77.9%，平衡准确率从仅推理生成的42.0%提升至80.7%。

Conclusion: 结果表明，通过可审计的运行时控制推理轨迹可以提升协议依从性，支持系统级视角；同时指出局限性包括规则覆盖范围、触发可靠性以及持续的"先诊断后生成"的动态问题。

Abstract: Large language models can produce confident but protocol-invalid answers in domains where procedural compliance is critical. This paper presents Answer Engineering, a deterministic runtime and authoring layer that applies localized rule-guided interventions to the visible reasoning trajectory during standard autoregressive generation, without retraining, modifying model weights, or performing global search. The method is evaluated on a controlled clinical benchmark for sudden sensorineural hearing loss (SSNHL), where correct management depends on protocol-consistent interpretation of symptom timing, Weber/Rinne tuning-fork findings, and otoscopic findings. In the benchmark, step-by-step reasoning shifted rather than eliminated errors: compliant outcomes for SSNHL decreased from 54.5% under unguided generation to 25.1%, while acceptance on the conductive contrast condition increased from 1.6% to 58.9%. Local trajectory editing increased SSNHL compliance to 83.5% and conductive-case adherence to 77.9%, raising balanced accuracy from 42.0% under reasoning-only generation to 80.7%. The results support a systems-level view in which protocol adherence can be improved through auditable runtime control of reasoning trajectories, while also identifying limitations caused by rule coverage, trigger reliability, and persistent diagnosis-first generation dynamics.

</details>


### [601] [Holmes: Multimodal Agentic Diagnosis for Mixed-Language Mobile Crashes at Industrial Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21963)
*Jia Li,Wenyuan Ma,Ting Peng,Haibin Zheng,Yuetang Deng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Holmes是一个多智能体系统，通过融合堆栈跟踪、日志和线程状态等多模态运行时信号，在不复现故障的情况下对超大规模工业应用进行根因分析。该系统采用层次化检索-探索-推理架构，在7000万行代码库中实现87.6%的函数级故障定位准确率，并将平均调查时间缩短98%以上至约77秒。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 超大规模工业应用中的移动崩溃诊断面临三大挑战：代码量巨大、混合语言环境复杂、故障无法本地复现。传统静态分析方法可扩展性不足，而现有基于LLM的智能体通常依赖可复现环境，无法适用于事后分析场景。

Method: Holmes提出层次化Retrieve-Explore-Reason（检索-探索-推理）架构，利用多模态运行时信号（堆栈跟踪、日志、线程状态）重构故障上下文；通过低级工件（寄存器、汇编代码）弥合开源业务逻辑与闭源系统框架之间的语义鸿沟；利用运行时线索动态压缩搜索空间，在7000万行代码库中精准定位非局部缺陷。

Result: 在微信真实崩溃数据上评估，Holmes实现了87.6%的函数级故障定位准确率，平均调查时间从数小时降至约77秒，降低超过98%。

Conclusion: Holmes成功将劳动密集型的移动应用调试工作转变为高效的验证流程，证明了多智能体系统在超大规模工业应用崩溃诊断中的有效性和实用价值。

Abstract: Diagnosing mobile crashes in ultra-large-scale industrial applications is a formidable challenge due to the sheer volume of code, the complexity of mixed-language environments, and the inability to reproduce failures locally. Traditional static analysis struggles with scalability, while existing LLM-based agents often rely on reproducible environments unavailable in post-mortem scenarios. We present Holmes, a multi-agent system that automates root cause analysis by synthesizing multimodal runtime signals--stack traces, logs, and thread states--to reconstruct failure contexts without reproduction. Holmes introduces a hierarchical Retrieve-Explore-Reason architecture that leverages low-level artifacts (e.g., registers, assembly) to bridge the semantic gap between open-source business logic and closed-source system frameworks. By dynamically compressing the search space using runtime clues, Holmes precisely navigates 70-million-line codebases to identify non-local defects. Evaluated on real-world crashes from WeChat, Holmes achieves 87.6% accuracy in function-level fault localization and reduces average investigation time by over 98% (to ~77 seconds), demonstrating its effectiveness in transforming labor-intensive debugging into an efficient verification workflow.

</details>


### [602] [PulseCX: Breaking the Closed-World Assumption in Real-Time CX](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21124)
*Rajat Agarwal,Suvidha Tripathi,Shubham Sharma*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: PulseCX 提出异步解耦知识获取与消费的框架，通过衰退感知时序知识图谱（DA-TKG）和分层意图门控，实现低延迟（<10ms）的动态环境意图解析与客户满意度提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统会话AI受限于封闭世界约束，无法应对快速变化的外部环境（如病毒式趋势、服务中断），而临时网络搜索会引入高延迟和上下文污染。

Method: 1) 结构优先范式设计；2) 异步代理将信号线性化为衰退感知时序知识图谱（DA-TKG），利用强化-衰退动力学管理信息生命周期；3) 分层意图门控与自进化记忆耦合，消除同步搜索瓶颈。

Result: 延迟开销<10ms，在动态环境中意图解析率（IRR）和客户满意度（s-CSAT）取得显著提升。

Conclusion: 通过解耦知识获取与消费，PulseCX有效克服了封闭世界约束，为动态CX场景提供了低延迟、高鲁棒性的会话AI解决方案。

Abstract: Conversational AI agents in Customer Experience (CX) typically suffer from a Closed-World Constraint, ignoring high-velocity external shifts like viral trends or outages. Ad-hoc web search attempts to bridge this gap but often introduce prohibitive latency and context poisoning. We introduce PulseCX, a framework that decouples knowledge acquisition from consumption. Adopting a structure-first paradigm, PulseCX employs an asynchronous agent to linearize signals into a Decay-Aware Temporal Knowledge Graph (DA-TKG) governed by reinforcement--decay dynamics to actively manage information lifecycles. By coupling this self-evolving memory with hierarchical intent gating, PulseCX removes synchronous search bottlenecks (<10ms overhead) and drives significant gains in Intent Resolution (IRR) and Customer Satisfaction (s-CSAT) in dynamic environments.

</details>


### [603] [CFAgentBench: A Reproducible Environment and Benchmark for Autonomous Construction-Finance Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22000)
*Rishi Srivastava*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: CFAgentBench是一个用于评估建筑金融自主代理的可复现基准测试环境，包含1,014个任务、35个模拟应用，核心特点是资金移动安全防护机制。测试发现最强模型pass@1为0.67但pass@5仅0.38，表明单次准确率高估了实际部署能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试缺乏针对建筑金融领域CFO/控制器级代理的真实、可复现评估环境，且忽视了资金移动等高风险操作的安全边界问题，因此需要构建一个覆盖完整软件栈、具备资金移动安全防护的可执行基准。

Method: 构建了包含1,014个任务（覆盖8个领域77个家族）的基准测试，基于35个模拟应用（31个统一财务账本+4个PM平台）、9种原型，采用功能正确性评估（状态差异+禁止副作用检查+输出正则），并嵌入278个资金移动安全防护实例。

Result: 在三个开源模型测试中（k=5），最强代理pass@1=0.67但pass@5=0.38，损失43%的成功率；存在显著的领域间异质性，表明单次准确率高估了实际部署能力。

Conclusion: CFAgentBench揭示了当前代理在建筑金融领域的真实能力局限性，单次尝试准确率并不能反映可靠部署所需的一致表现，强调了多轮评估和安全防护机制在专业领域代理评测中的必要性。

Abstract: We introduce CFAgentBench, a reproducible, self-hostable environment and benchmark for autonomous construction-finance agents: a CFO/controller-class agent operating across the real software stack a US construction finance team runs - ERP, project management, email, documents, pay applications, payroll, certified payroll, lien waivers, and bank/treasury portals. It contains 1,014 machine-gradeable task specifications across 8 domains and 77 families, every family grounded in a real source; a self-validated subset of 40 tasks (54 with a project-management extension) is compiled into oracle-validated executable evaluators, the runnable suite reported here. Following WebArena, the benchmark runs on an executable environment rather than static traces: 35 mock applications (31 reconciled to one company book, plus 4 PM platforms) over 9 archetypes, each implementing a uniform self-hostable app contract, so every task is graded by functional correctness - a state diff plus forbidden-side-effect checks plus required-output regexes - with an LLM judge used only for reply quality, never as reward. A distinguishing principle is a money-movement guard: 278 instances embed a payment, payroll, e-signature, or e-filing step where the correct behavior is to stop and stage for human approval, and executing even the correct transaction fails the task. The public split (n=711) is sized for a 95% Wilson half-width of +/-4.1%; a private, contamination-protected split (n=303) is reserved for remote scoring. In a first three-model open-weight sweep (k=5), the strongest agent reaches pass^1 = 0.67 but only pass^5 = 0.38 - losing 43% of its successes when required to repeat them under temperature-0 decoding. The within-model pass^1 to pass^5 collapse and sharp per-domain heterogeneity are clear evidence that single-attempt accuracy overstates deployable construction-finance competence.

</details>


### [604] [Learning Burst-Aware Early Warning Models for Capacity Stress under AI Workload Surges in Hyperscale Data Centers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21130)
*Zihan Yu,Xianling Zeng,Zhiming Xue,Yalun Qi,Sichen Zhao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向部署的、突发感知的早期预警框架，用于在AI工作负载激增下进行主动容量压力预测。该框架采用轻量级XGBoost模型，在高召回率设置下（Recall=0.914）有效检测压力期，并支持工作负载限流和资源扩缩容等主动干预操作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模AI工作负载（特别是LLM训练和推理）的增长带来了突发性、高强度、快速变化的资源需求，传统基于阈值的被动响应机制无法有效应对这种容量压力。

Method: 将问题建模为多变量遥测窗口上的高召回率预测任务；集成工作负载强度、时间变化和系统压力信号；采用轻量级树模型（XGBoost）处理高度不平衡环境中的非线性交互；并提出AI工作负载激增注入模拟方法用于评估。

Result: XGBoost模型在ROC AUC上达到0.697，AP达到0.670；在面向部署的阈值选择下，Recall达到0.914，能以可接受的误报成本检测大部分压力期。

Conclusion: 该框架可集成到运营控制回路中，支持主动措施（如工作负载限流和资源扩缩容），展示了基于学习的高召回率早期预警系统在AI驱动数据中心弹性运营中的实用价值。

Abstract: The rapid growth of large-scale AI workloads, particularly Large Language Model (LLM) training and inference, is fundamentally reshaping the operational dynamics of hyperscale data centers. Unlike traditional cloud workloads, AI-driven jobs exhibit bursty, high-intensity, and rapidly shifting resource demands, often leading to sudden capacity stress that cannot be effectively handled by reactive threshold-based mechanisms. In this paper, we propose a deployment-oriented, burst-aware early warning framework for proactive capacity stress prediction under AI workload surges. We formulate the problem as a high-recall forecasting task over multivariate telemetry windows, with the explicit goal of enabling operational intervention before system degradation occurs. The proposed framework integrates workload intensity, temporal variation, and system pressure signals, and employs a lightweight tree-based learning model to capture nonlinear interactions in highly imbalanced environments. To evaluate the system under realistic conditions, we introduce an AI workload surge injection methodology that simulates burst-driven demand patterns observed in large-scale AI systems. Our XGBoost-based model achieves an ROC AUC of 0.697 and an AP of 0.670, significantly outperforming baseline methods. Under deployment-oriented threshold selection, the framework achieves a Recall of 0.914, enabling the detection of the majority of stress-prone periods with acceptable false-alarm cost. Beyond predictive performance, we show how the proposed framework can be integrated into operational control loops to support proactive actions such as workload throttling and resource scaling. Our results highlight the practical value of high-recall, learning-based early warning systems in enabling resilient and adaptive data center operations in the era of AI-driven workloads.

</details>


### [605] [Hypothesis-Driven Skill Optimization for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22330)
*Fangxin Shang,Yehui Yang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出HDSO框架，通过可验证的假设驱动技能优化，让冻结的LLM智能体在无需训练的情况下安全地发现、验证和整合外部技能，在ALFWorld上提升6.9-7.1个百分点的成功率，并能抵御20%的随机反馈噪声。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 外部技能可以提升智能体性能，但从稀疏或噪声轨迹中蒸馏技能存在风险（伪影/捷径/不可执行规则），需要一种可审计的技能生命周期管理方法。

Method: HDSO框架：技能策展者观察执行者轨迹→提出可证伪假设+验证方案→实例化为候选技能包→通过配对对照/实验验证→审查差异→仅通过支持候选者；执行者渐进式披露已批准技能，未选择时保留纯执行路径。

Result: ALFWorld上：Qwen3-8B提升+6.9 SR点，Qwen3.6-27B提升+4.0点；20%随机反转反馈下仍保持+7.1点增益；验证技能库可跨运行迁移，但跨模型策展需对齐。

Conclusion: HDSO提供了可审计的冻结智能体技能生命周期，而非无约束的记忆积累，确保只有经过严格验证的技能才会被采纳。

Abstract: External skills can improve action-oriented LLM agents without changing model weights, but persistent skill updates are risky when they are distilled from sparse or noisy trajectories. A plausible reflection may encode a useful procedure, a spurious shortcut, or a rule that the target executor cannot reliably follow. We propose Hypothesis-Driven Skill Optimization (HDSO), a train-free framework in which both the skill curator and the agent executor are frozen inference endpoints. The curator observes executor traces, proposes a falsifiable hypothesis with an explicit validation plan, instantiates the hypothesis as a candidate skill package, validates the package through paired control/treatment executions, reviews behavior differences, and consolidates only supported candidates into an approved repository. The executor consumes approved skills through progressive disclosure, preserving the executor-only path when no skill is selected. On ALFWorld, HDSO improves executor-only baselines by +6.9 Avg. SR points for Qwen3-8B and +4.0 points for Qwen3.6-27B. Under 20% randomly flipped success/failure feedback during skill discovery and validation, HDSO preserves a +7.1-point gain for Qwen3-8B. Transfer and heterogeneous-pair diagnostics further show that validated repositories can be useful beyond the run that produced them, but cross-model curation succeeds only when curator diagnosis, executor capability, and validation evidence align. HDSO provides an auditable skill lifecycle for frozen action agents rather than an unconstrained memory accumulation procedure.

</details>


### [606] [Trip+: Benchmarking Agents in Personalized Interactive Travel Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21169)
*Junle Chen,Wei Chen,Yehong Xu,Zhengjun Huang,Yuqian Wu,Zhoujin Tian,Kai Wang,Lei Wang,Xiaofang Zhou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该论文提出了Trip+基准，用于评估语言模型在交互式旅行规划中生成和修订分钟级行程的能力，发现现有模型偏好技术可行但不符合用户偏好的疲惫行程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准在可行性、个性化或交互性评估上较为孤立，缺乏对旅行规划整体体验的全面衡量，尤其是主观指标（如疲劳度）的评估。

Method: 提出Trip+基准，结合旅行者画像和动态交互，要求模型生成并修订分钟级行程；使用基于LLM的模拟器评估端到端旅行体验（含主观指标）；场景涵盖简单请求到复杂环境驱动的重新规划。

Result: 评估了18个语言模型，发现模型在体验质量上存在一致差距，倾向于生成技术上可行但令人疲惫的行程，与旅行者画像偏好严重偏离。

Conclusion: 现有模型在交互式旅行规划中缺乏对主观体验的建模能力，Trip+为衡量这一能力提供了更全面的测试框架。

Abstract: Interactive travel planning has become a popular use case for language models. Agents are deployed to manage evolving preferences and unexpected disruptions over multiple turns. Such settings require models to make complex, profile-conditioned planning decisions. However, existing benchmarks often evaluate feasibility, personalization, or interaction in relatively isolated settings. We therefore introduce Trip+ to measure the ability of agents to plan travel holistically. In Trip+, given traveler profiles and dynamic interactions, agents must generate and revise minute-level itineraries. End-to-end traveler experiences are evaluated via an LLM-based simulator, enabling the assessment of subjective metrics like fatigue. Our scenarios range from simple request resolutions to complex environment-driven replanning. We evaluate 18 LMs and find a consistent gap in experiential quality. Models favor technically feasible but exhausting itineraries that diverge sharply from profiled traveler preferences.

</details>


### [607] [Text2DSL: LLM-Based Code Generation for Domain-Specific Languages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22586)
*Alexander V. Kozachok,Alexander M. Nazimov,Shamil G. Magomedov*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文正式提出了Text2DSL问题（从自然语言描述生成领域特定语言代码），并构建了PolkitBench数据集（4,204条验证过的自然语言-Polkit规则对）。实验表明，向大语言模型提供结构化上下文（BNF语法、API规范、标识符词汇表）可显著提升DSL代码生成质量，无需微调即可使语法有效性达到98.6-99.4%，CodeBLEU提升60-95%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DSL安全策略的编写需要高度专业知识且容易出错，而现有的Text-to-SQL和通用代码生成方法不适用于DSL这一特殊问题类别。作者希望系统性地解决从自然语言到DSL代码的自动生成问题。

Method: 1）形式化定义Text2DSL问题；2）构建PolkitBench数据集（4,204对），通过三级AST流水线验证；3）在两个不同规模和来源的MoE模型（GigaChat-10B-A1.8B和Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B）上进行控制提示实验，比较有无结构化上下文的效果。

Result: 提供结构化上下文后：语法有效性达98.6-99.4%，结构有效性提升+9.7至+35.5个百分点，CodeBLEU提升+60%至+95%。该效果在两个不同规模和来源的模型上表现一致。

Conclusion: 对于Text2DSL类问题，将正式的目标语言规范注入提示上下文是一个鲁棒的关键因素，能够在不进行模型微调的情况下实现高质量生成。

Abstract: Domain-specific languages (DSLs) are widely used for managing operating system security policies, yet manually authoring rules in such languages demands high expertise and is error-prone. This paper formalises the task of automatic DSL code generation from natural language descriptions - Text2DSL - as a distinct problem class, separate from Text-to-SQL and general-purpose code generation. We introduce the PolkitBench dataset comprising 4,204 verified natural-language-to-Polkit-rule pairs, each validated through a three-level AST-based pipeline. Controlled prompt experiments on two MoE models of different scale and provenance - GigaChat-10B-A1.8B (1.8B active parameters) and Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B (3B active) - demonstrate the critical role of structured context (BNF grammar, API specification, permitted identifier vocabulary) for LLM-based DSL code generation. Across both models, supplying context raises syntactic validity to 98.6-99.4%, structural validity by +9.7 to +35.5 pp, and the CodeBLEU score by +60% to +95%. The consistency of the effect across models of different scale and provenance indicates that, for the Text2DSL class of problems, injecting a formal target-language specification into the prompt context is a robust enabling factor for high-quality generation without model fine-tuning.

</details>


### [608] [Whistleblowing and the machine -- towards a considered position](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21201)
*Marija Slavkovik,Liuwen Yu,Leon van der Torre,Reka Markovich*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文探讨了人工智能代理和自主系统的告密（whistleblowing）问题，主张机器告密应当基于规范性和原则性，并且需要政府监管机构制定明确的立场和法律保护。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究表明人工智能代理能够进行告密行为，且数字多智能体环境应允许代理告密，但缺乏对机器告密的规范性、原则性理解以及相关的法律和政策框架。

Method: 基于对现有告密理论的理解，结合人工智能代理的特性，从规范性角度论证机器告密应当遵循的原则，并提出政府监管的必要性。

Result: 提出了机器告密必须具有规范性和原则性，并根植于现有的告密理论；同时指出需要政府监管机构制定明确的立场和法律保护机制。

Conclusion: 人工智能代理的告密行为需要规范化的理论指导和法律框架，政府监管机构应当介入制定相关政策和法律保护。

Abstract: Artificial intelligent agents and autonomous systems are embedded in our environments. They are both a commercial product and a personal tool that generates a lot of data and can draw conclusions from it: machines generate and keep secrets. But should machines protect all secrets? It has been shown that artificial agents are able to whistleblow and it has been argued that digital multi-agent environments should allow for agents in them to whistleblow. We argue that machine whistleblowing must be normative and principled and routed in the existing understanding of whistleblowing as an important rule-breaking mechanism in society. We also argue that there is a need for government regulators to formulate an informed stance on both what machines should be allowed to whistleblow on and how to legally protect those who develop whistleblowing machines

</details>


### [609] [AgentLens: Interpretable Safety Steering via Mechanistic Subspaces for Multi-Turn Coding Agent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22673)
*Weidi Luo,Qiming Zhang,Yihao Quan,Mingyu Jin,Jie Cai,Chaowei Xiao,Jingcheng Niu,Zhen Xiang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文提出了AgentLens，一个白盒防御框架，通过在单层10维子空间中干预编码代理的隐藏表征，实现运行时安全检测与行为缓解，并构建了MAS基准用于多轮编码代理的安全性评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有安全机制主要依赖外部护栏，难以在代码代理多轮执行过程中进行细粒度行为控制；而机械可解释性方法多局限于单轮或越狱式问答场景，无法捕捉多轮代理执行中动态演化的风险。

Method: 提出AgentLens白盒防御框架，从步骤级隐藏表征中检测有害执行状态，并在单层10维子空间中进行表示级干预来缓解不安全行为。同时构建MAS基准，包含194个任务的多轮执行轨迹及详细标注。

Result: AgentLens在安全检测任务上表现优异，具备前瞻性风险预判能力，显著减少了编码代理的危害行为。

Conclusion: AgentLens为将机械可解释性应用于动态LLM代理安全奠定了基础。

Abstract: Coding agents based on large language models (LLMs) demonstrate remarkable autonomous capabilities, but they also introduce significant safety and misuse risks during multi-turn interactions with external environments. Existing safety mechanisms mainly rely on external guardrails, which have a limited ability to perform fine-grained behavioral control during execution. Meanwhile, recent mechanistic interpretability methods for LLM safety are mostly confined to single-turn or jailbreak-style QA settings, limiting their ability to capture the evolving risk dynamics of multi-turn agent execution. In this paper, we investigate the safety of multi-turn coding agents from an internal perspective. We propose AgentLens (Mechanistic Subspace Intervention and Steering), a white-box defense framework that performs runtime safety detection and representation-level mitigation for coding agents. Unlike conventional agent guardrails, AgentLens detect harmful execution states from step-level hidden representations and mitigate unsafe behavior by intervening in a 10-dimensional subspace within a single layer. To support this research, we introduce the Mechanistic Agent Safety (MAS) benchmark, comprising comprehensively annotated multi-turn execution trajectories across 194 tasks using LLaMA-3.1-8B, Qwen-2.5-7B, and Gemma-2-9B. Extensive experiments show that AgentLens achieves strong safety detection performance, provides preliminary evidence for lookahead risk anticipation, and substantially reduces harmful actions of the coding agent, establishing a foundation for applying mechanistic interpretability to dynamic LLM agent safety. The code is available at: https://github.com/EddyLuo1232/AgentLens

</details>


### [610] [ARCO: Adaptive Rubric with Co-Evolution for Multi-Step LLM-Based Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21262)
*Zihang Tian,Jingsen Zhang,Rui Li,Xiaohe Bo,Yuanzi Li,Xu Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: ARCO提出了一种自适应评标共进化框架，让同一模型同时生成逐步骤评价标准和打分，实现步骤级奖励分配，并与策略网络共同进化，在多项多跳QA任务上取得最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于评标的奖励方法存在两个关键问题：一是只能在轨迹级别评分，无法实现步骤级信用分配；二是评标器（judge）固定不变，无法随策略进化而自适应调整。

Method: ARCO让同一规模模型μ共享一个主干网络，分为两个头：生成头产出每步评标标准，打分头预测基于评标的步骤级奖励。通过轨迹分解约束（步骤奖励之和等于最终结果）实现无步骤标签的信用分配，同时μ和策略π在策略数据上联合更新，使评标内容和打分函数在参数层面共进化。

Result: 在HotpotQA、2WikiMultiHopQA和MuSiQue三个数据集上，使用两个开源基座模型，ARCO在所有设置下均超越强基线（结果奖励、评标奖励、过程奖励），最佳EM指标均取得提升。

Conclusion: ARCO的评标具有步骤特异性、对设计选择鲁棒，并能有效用于诊断智能体行为。代码和数据集已开源。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning for multi-step LLM agents often relies on scalar rewards that indicate success but cannot explain why a trajectory is good or bad. Rubric-based rewards improve interpretability through natural-language criteria, but existing methods score at the trajectory level and freeze the scorer behind a closed-source judge, leaving step-level credit assignment unresolved and the judge itself static. We propose ARCO (Adaptive Rubric CO-evolution), a rubric framework in which a same-scale model $μ$ shares a backbone with two heads: a generation head that produces per-step criteria, and a score head that predicts rubric-conditioned step-level rewards. A trajectory decomposition constraint ties the sum of step rewards to the terminal outcome, enabling credit assignment without step-level labels, while $μ$ and the policy $π$ are jointly updated on on-policy data so that the rubric content and the scoring function co-evolve at the parameter level. Across HotpotQA, 2WikiMultiHopQA, and MuSiQue with two open-source backbones, ARCO improves the best EM in every setting over strong outcome-, rubric-, and process-reward baselines, and analyses show that its rubrics are step-specific, robust to design choices, and useful for diagnosing agent behavior. Codes and data are available at https://github.com/zihangtian/ARCO.

</details>


### [611] [GroundEval: A Deterministic Replacement for LLM-as-Judge in Stateful Agent Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22737)
*Jeffrey Flynt*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: GroundEval 是一个无需人工法官的评估框架，通过追踪智能体的搜索、检索、引用和访问记录，来检验其回答是否基于真实的证据路径。案例表明，传统 LLM 法官评分可能高达 0.85+，但 GroundEval 揭示智能体从未检索到关键证据，评分仅为 0.000。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 LLM-as-judge 评估方式存在盲区，无法检测智能体是否使用了正确的证据，尤其是因果机制、时间视角和事实核查方面的问题。

Method: GroundEval 基于领域配置生成问题，记录智能体的完整轨迹（搜索、检索、引用、访问权限），并从 Silence（是否核查后再声称缺失）、Perspective（是否仅使用当时可获取的证据）、Counterfactual（是否使用正确的因果机制）三个轨道进行评分。

Result: 案例中，两个前沿 LLM 法官对看似合理的回答评分 >0.85，但 GroundEval 发现智能体从未检索到关键证据，评分仅 0.000，揭示了传统评估的严重盲区。

Conclusion: 答案的合理性不代表证据路径的正确性，GroundEval 使得评分可审查、可解释，填补了传统终答案评分和法官评分无法捕捉的空白。

Abstract: Before letting an agent operate over real context, can you prove it used the right evidence? GroundEval turns that question into a deterministic test of what the agent searched, fetched, cited, and was permitted to access. In one case study, two frontier LLM judges scored a plausible agent response above 0.85. But the trace told a different story: the agent had never retrieved the artifact its answer depended on, yielding a GroundEval score of 0.000.
  We introduce GroundEval, a judge-free framework for evaluating agents against grounded, time-bounded, and access-controlled evidence. GroundEval uses a domain configuration to generate questions, lets the agent choose how to answer, and then scores both the final answer and the recorded trajectory that produced it. The benchmark targets three failures that LLM-as-judge evaluation struggles to detect: whether an agent checked before claiming absence, reasoned only from evidence available to the actor at the relevant time, and used the correct causal mechanism rather than a plausible one. These correspond to three tracks: Silence, Perspective, and Counterfactual. GroundEval exposes when plausible answers rest on invalid evidence paths, and produces structured per-question diagnostics that pair tool activity with the agent's turn-level narration, making each score inspectable rather than merely reported. What our case studies turned up is that this gap isn't some rare corner case. It's exactly the blind spot that final-answer and judge-based scoring were never built to catch.

</details>


### [612] [Towards Dys-XAI: Influence-Based Explanations for Dysarthria Severity Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21306)
*Xiaoliang Wu,Qiyang Sun,Yupei Li,Erfan Loweimi,Jennifer Williams,Zhengjun Yue*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于影响力的实例级可解释性框架，通过支持性和竞争性训练样本来解释构音障碍严重程度评估模型的决策，解决了深度学习模型在临床应用中缺乏可解释性的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有构音障碍评估深度模型虽然性能强，但黑箱特性限制了临床采纳；而已有的语音可解释性方法提供的声学特征重要性分数对终端用户（临床医生）难以理解，需要更直观、可审计的解释方式。

Method: 基于梯度的影响力近似方法，计算每个语音片段的影响力分数，识别支持性（supportive）和竞争性（competing）训练样本，从而解释模型对每个测试样本的预测决策。

Result: 在5%到20%的受控删除实验中验证了方法的有效性，移除高影响力样本会系统性地改变模型的预测结果。

Conclusion: 该方法通过将模型的决策链接到可感知的参考案例，提供了可审计的解释，有望提升临床医生对深度学习模型的信任和采纳。

Abstract: Dysarthria severity assessment is essential for therapy planning and longitudinal monitoring, yet manual perceptual rating is time-consuming and variable across clinicians. Although deep learning models achieve strong performance, their black-box nature limits clinical adoption. Existing speech explainability methods typically provide acoustic feature importance scores that are difficult for end-users to interpret. We propose an influence-based, instance-level explainability framework that explains each decision through supportive and competing training samples. Using gradient-based influence approximations, we compute per-utterance influence scores to identify supportive and competing training samples for each prediction. Controlled deletion experiments from 5 to 20 percent validate the explanations, showing that removing highly influential samples systematically shifts predictions. This approach provides auditable explanations by linking decisions to perceptible reference cases.

</details>


### [613] [Managing Procedural Memory in LLM Agents: Control, Adaptation, and Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23127)
*Julia Belikova,Rauf Parchiev,Evgeny Egorov,Grigorii Davydenko,Gleb Gusev,Andrey Savchenko,Maksim Makarenko*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AFTER基准，包含382个企业任务和22个程序性技能，用于评估LLM代理的程序性记忆在任务、角色和模型间的迁移能力。实验表明程序性记忆能持续提升性能，多模型进化技能实现73.1%跨模型准确率，且不同技能的泛化能力存在差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 程序性记忆被越来越多地用于改进LLM代理在重复性工作场景中的表现，但其生成可复用技能的能力尚不明确。现有研究缺乏系统评估技能迁移效果的基准和方法。

Method: 构建AFTER基准，涵盖6个专业角色、22个程序性技能、382个企业任务；设计四种评估设置：局部改进、跨任务迁移、跨角色迁移和跨模型泛化。

Result: 单轮优化提升聚合性能3.7-6.7个点；多模型执行轨迹进化出的技能达到73.1%跨模型测试准确率；部分技能可广泛泛化，部分技能则变得专业化并在迁移中失效。

Conclusion: 程序性记忆在工业工作流中能带来稳定增益，多模型进化策略优于单模型；技能泛化能力差异显著，为构建和部署程序性记忆系统提供了实用指导。

Abstract: Procedural memory is increasingly used to improve LLM agents on recurring workplace tasks, yet its ability to produce reusable skills remains poorly understood. We introduce AFTER, a benchmark of 382 realistic enterprise tasks spanning six professional roles and 22 procedural skills, designed to evaluate how skills transfer across tasks, roles, and model backbones. The benchmark includes controlled evaluation settings for local improvement, cross-task transfer, cross-role transfer, and cross-model generalization. Experiments show that procedural memory delivers consistent gains in industrial workflows: a single refinement round improves aggregate performance by 3.7-6.7 points, while skills evolved from diverse multi-model execution traces achieve 73.1% cross-model test accuracy, outperforming all single-model trace sources. We further find that some skills generalize broadly across tasks and models, whereas others become specialized to role-specific workflows and lose effectiveness under transfer. These results provide practical guidance for building, evaluating, and deploying procedural memory systems in production agent platforms.

</details>


### [614] [Social World Model for Lifelong Social Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21315)
*Yu Luo*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出社会世界模型(Social World Model)，通过将社交互动分解为五个维度构建闭环学习框架，使小模型能够持续学习社交能力，在实际基准测试中超越基线并达到零遗忘。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究仅关注社交智能的静态评估，缺乏可持续学习范式；社交交互轨迹缺少统一结构化表示，能力提升与保持被孤立研究。

Method: 提出Social World Model，将社交互动分解为场景设置、观察、心理状态、动作和对话五个维度，构建闭环学习框架：收集交互经验→转化为偏好信号→更新模型策略→重新部署持续学习。

Result: 基于ASCENT-Bench验证，Qwen2.5-7B在五项核心指标上均超越基线，完成率与Gemini 3 Flash相当，通过率超越之，且在三个难度级别上实现零遗忘。

Conclusion: 该端到端方法提供了可训练、可验证、可保持的社交能力学习路径，证明小型开源模型能够可持续地获得竞争性社交协调能力。

Abstract: Social intelligence is a core competency for language agents, yet current research primarily focuses on static capability evaluation rather than how these skills are continuously shaped and accumulated. This gap calls for a shift toward sustainable learning paradigms. Currently, two methodological pain points exist: social interaction trajectories lack unified structured representations to form iterable learning signals, and capability improvement and retention are typically studied in isolation, hindering the assessment of continuous evolution.
  To bridge this gap, we propose the Social World Model. We decompose social interaction into five dimensions (scene setting, observation, mental state, action, and dialogue) to build a closed-loop learning framework. In this setup, agents collect interaction experiences, convert them into preference signals for model updating, and redeploy the updated policy for continued learning. Additionally, we provide a reusable data synthesis mechanism and a lifelong learning benchmark, transforming social capabilities from an "object of evaluation" into an "object of sustainable training".
  Validating our framework on the ASCENT-Bench, the interactively trained Qwen2.5-7B model outperforms its baseline across all five core metrics. Notably, it matches the closed-source Gemini 3 Flash in completion rate, exceeds it in pass rate, and achieves zero forgetting across three difficulty levels. Unlike prior works that merely report static comparisons or capability decay, this end-to-end approach provides a trainable, verifiable, and retainable pathway, demonstrating that small open-source models can sustainably acquire competitive social coordination capabilities.

</details>


### [615] [Mind the Noise: Sensitivity of Transformer-based Interaction-Aware Trajectory Prediction Models to Noisy Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21344)
*Shahab Salehi,Luca Lusvarghi,Miguel Sepulcre,Javier Gozalvez*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文分析了噪声对基于Transformer的交互感知轨迹预测模型的影响，发现预测精度在噪声影响下会显著下降（最高达3.9倍），揭示了现有模型对噪声的高度敏感性，并呼吁更真实的训练数据集和噪声缓解策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有轨迹预测模型多在高质量、无噪声的数据集上训练和评估，但真实场景中物体状态估计存在感知不确定性、定位误差以及V2X通信引入的噪声，这些噪声对预测精度的影响尚未被充分研究。

Method: 通过在状态-of-the-art的基于Transformer的交互感知轨迹预测模型上，引入不同强度的噪声，定量分析预测精度随噪声水平变化的退化程度。

Result: 小噪声水平下预测精度下降1.3倍，在最高（但现实）噪声条件下下降高达3.9倍，预测精度随噪声强度增加而快速恶化。

Conclusion: 轨迹预测模型对噪声高度敏感，现有训练和评估数据集缺乏真实噪声环境，亟需更真实的基准数据集和有效的噪声缓解策略以提升模型在实际部署中的鲁棒性。

Abstract: Trajectory prediction allows autonomous vehicles to anticipate the future behavior of surrounding objects (or agents) and, accordingly, maximize the safety and efficiency of their driving. State-of-the-art Transformed-based interaction-aware trajectory prediction models, which rely on attention mechanisms to capture multi-agent interactions and maximize prediction accuracy, are commonly trained and evaluated on long-range high-quality datasets. These datasets are typically obtained by aggregating data from multiple vehicles or drones and removing any object detection or tracking noise offline. Yet, information about a surrounding object's state (its position, speed, heading) is far from being noiseless in real-world deployments. Object state estimation is affected by perception uncertainties and localization errors that can be particularly large for objects received via Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communications. In this paper, we analyze the impact of noisy object state information on the trajectory prediction accuracy of a state-of-the-art Transformer-based interaction-aware trajectory prediction model. Our study demonstrates that trajectory prediction accuracy can rapidly deteriorate as the noise intensity increases. Numerical results show that the prediction accuracy can reduce by a 1.3x factor under small noise levels and by as much as a 3.9x factor under the highest (yet realistic) noise conditions. These findings reveal the strong sensitivity of trajectory prediction models to noisy data, underscoring the need for more realistic training and evaluation datasets as well as noise mitigation strategies.

</details>


### [616] [Calibration Is Not Control: Why LLM-Agent Oversight Needs Intervention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21399)
*Chubin Zhang,Zhenglin Wan,Xingrui Yu,Jingxuan Wu,Qi Wen,Pengfei Zhou,Wangbo Zhao,Ivor Tsang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出当前LLM代理的运行时监督框架存在目标错误——它关注风险评分而非干预收益。作者引入"干预优势"（intervention advantage）作为更合适的监督目标，并通过"前缀分支"（prefix branching）协议进行测量。实验表明，基于动作条件的控制在多个基准上优于标量路由，而标量重新校准虽能改善预测指标却无法降低控制遗憾。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM代理监督框架将运行时监督简化为标量风险预测（估计失败概率、置信度或不确定性），然后根据阈值进行干预。作者认为这种框架瞄准了错误的控制目标：两个轨迹前缀可能有相同的风险估计，但一个可恢复而另一个不可恢复，因此需要不同的干预决策。关键在于干预能否改善结果，而非代理继续执行时失败的可能性有多大。

Method: 1) 形式化定义了"目标误差"（target error）来量化风险评分与最优决策之间的不匹配；2) 提出"干预优势"作为监督的决策对象——即干预相较于继续执行的期望效用增益；3) 引入"前缀分支"（prefix branching）协议，一种同前缀反事实方法，从相同轨迹状态执行候选动作来测量干预优势；4) 构建简单的仅前缀（prefix-only）动作条件控制器进行实验。

Result: 1) 在四个基准上，动作条件控制在不同交互强度下展现出优于标量路由的性能；2) 在标量校准分解实验中，重新校准相同标量分数改善了预测指标但未改变控制遗憾（control regret），表明校准本身无法修复目标误差；3) 在ALFWorld的最强交互场景中，简单的前缀动作条件控制器将遗憾从0.506降至0.110；4) 当干预本身较弱或标量路由已保留干预相关信息时，增益会缩小。

Conclusion: LLM代理的监督应转向"动作条件价值估计"（action-conditioned value estimation）而非校准的风险评分，即从"评估失败概率"转变为"评估干预带来的价值增益"。

Abstract: Runtime oversight for LLM agents is commonly framed as scalar risk prediction: estimate failure likelihood, confidence, or uncertainty, then intervene once the score crosses a threshold. We argue that this framing targets the wrong object for control. The relevant question is not how likely the agent is to fail if it continues, but whether an available intervention would improve the outcome. Two trajectory prefixes can have the same risk estimate while requiring different actions, because one remains recoverable and the other does not. We formalize this mismatch as target error and identify intervention advantage, the expected utility gain from intervening rather than continuing, as the decision object for oversight. To measure this mismatch, we introduce prefix branching, a same-prefix counterfactual protocol that executes candidate actions from identical trajectory states. Across four benchmarks, action-conditioned control yields regime-dependent gains over scalar routing. In a calibration decomposition, recalibrating the same scalar score improves prediction metrics but leaves control regret unchanged, showing that calibration alone does not repair target error. A simple prefix-only action-conditioned controller substantially reduces regret in the strongest interactive regime, from 0.506 to 0.110 on ALFWorld. Gains shrink when interventions are weak or when scalar routing already preserves intervention-relevant information. These results suggest that LLM-agent oversight should move from calibrated risk scoring toward action-conditioned value estimation.

</details>


### [617] [Causal Discovery in the Era of Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23608)
*Yujia Zheng,Vishal Verma,Mantej Gill,Haoyue Dai,Peter Spirtes,Kun Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出因果发现中LLM应作为辅助工具而非因果证据提供者，并构建了causal-learn+平台来实践这一原则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有结合LLM与因果发现的方法存在将文本关联、提示伪影和幻觉机制混淆为因果证据的风险，需要明确区分LLM的辅助角色与因果结论的数据驱动本质。

Method: 提出"代理辅助工作流，因果结论扎根于数据"的原则；在causal-learn+平台中协调数据分析、预处理、方法推荐、专家知识整合、形式化发现与解释等环节。

Result: 通过大五人格数据的案例研究，展示了代理辅助的因果发现流程，避免了LLM不可靠性转化为因果证据的问题。

Conclusion: LLM在因果发现中应承担辅助角色（检查数据、检索上下文、解释假设、澄清输出），而不应提供边、方向、先验或因果结论。

Abstract: Recent attempts to combine large language models (LLMs) with causal discovery ask models to infer pairwise directions, propose graph structures, or inject language-model outputs as priors and constraints. These approaches promise faster analysis, but they also obscure whether a causal evidence is supported by data and assumptions or by textual associations, prompt artifacts and hallucinated mechanisms. We argue for a different role for agents in causal discovery. Agents should inspect data, retrieve context, explain method assumptions and clarify graph outputs, but they should not supply edges, orientations, priors, constraints or causal conclusions. We propose the principle that agents assist the workflow, while causal claims remain grounded in data, explicit assumptions, formal algorithms, diagnostics and user or domain-expert decisions. We instantiate this principle in causal-learn+, an online platform that coordinates data analysis, preprocessing, method recommendation, expert-knowledge incorporation, formal discovery and interpretation around the algorithmic ecosystem of causal-learn. A case study on Big Five personality data illustrates agent-assisted pipeline of causal discovery without turning language-model unreliability into causal evidence. The platform is available at causallearn.com.

</details>


### [618] [Don't Blindly Trust It: How Unreliable Feedback Breaks Tool-Using LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21409)
*Chubin Zhang,Zhenglin Wan,Xingrui Yu,Pengfei Zhou,Wangbo Zhao,Jingxuan Wu,Yaxin Zhou,Ivor Tsang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文发现，工具增强型智能体在不可靠反馈下会出现价值反转：使用不可靠工具的表现甚至低于无反馈基线。研究表明，干净的工具有可能夸大工具价值，匹配的无反馈基线对于评估工具增强型智能体至关重要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工具增强型智能体评估通常假设外部反馈可靠，忽略了反馈不可靠时的反事实问题：当反馈不可靠时，智能体是否比完全不接收任务证据表现更差？

Method: 采用受控的匹配循环比较方法，固定智能体循环、提示、动作空间和解码方式，仅改变返回的观察结果（忠实、误导或缺失），在问答和事实验证任务上进行实验。

Result: 在HotpotQA上，Qwen2.5-7B在清洁检索下F1为44.8，无反馈下为22.3，但混乱检索下骤降至4.7。价值反转在强清洁检索和局部合理干扰下仍存在，但在后续清洁证据可修复轨迹时减弱。早期轨迹信号可预测多数失败。

Conclusion: 清洁工具带来的增益可能夸大工具的真实价值，匹配的无反馈基线控制对于评估工具增强型智能体是必要的。简单的修复策略（如拒绝不良证据）仅在暴露的基线可靠时才有效。

Abstract: Tool-augmented agents are typically evaluated by their gains under reliable external feedback. Yet these gains leave open a key counterfactual: when feedback is unreliable, would the agent be better off receiving no task evidence? We study this question with a controlled matched-loop comparison that fixes the agent loop, prompt, action space, and decoding, while varying only the returned observation: faithful, misleading, or absent. Across question answering and fact verification, persistent misleading feedback produces a value inversion: agents that benefit from clean tools can perform worse than the matched no-feedback fallback. On HotpotQA, Qwen2.5-7B reaches 44.8 F1 with clean retrieval and 22.3 F1 with no feedback, but drops to 4.7 F1 under shuffled retrieval. The inversion persists under stronger clean retrieval and locally plausible distractors, but weakens when later clean evidence can repair the trajectory. Early trajectory signals predict many failures, yet simple repairs remain fallback-limited: rejecting bad evidence helps only when the exposed fallback is reliable. These results show that clean-tool gains can overstate tool value, and that matched no-feedback fallback controls are necessary for evaluating tool-augmented agents.

</details>


### [619] [AutoRAS: Learning Robust Agentic Systems with Primitive Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21445)
*Yang Yue,Xuancheng Zhu,Yuyang Ma,Guoshun Nan,Zihan Dou,Jingru Shan,Congyu Guo,Ji Zhang,Hua Wang,Jingfeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: AutoRAS是一个自动化设计鲁棒多智能体系统的框架，通过符号原语序列编码结构和行为，利用执行安全信号和流式序列目标进行优化，在普通和对抗设置下均达到最佳性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动设计多智能体工作流的方法主要关注任务性能提升，而鲁棒性常被忽视，系统在面对外部对抗攻击和内部故障时容易失效。

Method: 将系统设计形式化为生成符号原语序列（联合编码结构连接和行为动作），利用执行导出的安全信号和基于流的序列级目标来优化该序列。

Result: 在普通和对抗设置下均取得最佳性能，性能下降幅度最小；展现出强迁移性、稳定的优化行为、跨原语集合的稳定性以及良好的成本权衡。

Conclusion: AutoRAS有效解决了多智能体系统的鲁棒性问题，为自动化设计鲁棒智能体系统提供了新范式。

Abstract: The automated design of agentic systems offers a promising pathway for scaling large language models (LLMs) beyond single-agent reasoning. While prior work has advanced task performance through handcrafted or automatically generated multi-agent workflows, robustness is often treated as an afterthought, leaving systems vulnerable to external adversaries and internal failures. We propose AutoRAS, a framework for the Automated design of Robust Agentic Systems. AutoRAS formulates system design as generating a sequence of symbolic primitives that jointly encode structural connectivity and behavioral actions, and learns to optimize this sequence using execution-derived safety signals and flow-based sequence-level objectives. Extensive experiments show that AutoRAS achieves the best performance in both vanilla and adversarial settings, with the smallest performance degradation under attacks. Further analyses demonstrate strong transferability, stable optimization behavior, stability across primitive sets, and favorable cost trade-offs. Our code is available at $\href{https://github.com/guohezuy/AutoRAS}{\text{this https URL}}$.

</details>


### [620] [Towards Transparent Mental Health Insights: An Explainable AI Model for Career-Related Depression and Anxiety Among University Students Using Structured Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21474)
*Arsham Azam,Rasikh Ali,Tayyaba Farhat,Sheeraz Akram*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一种结合可解释AI与联邦学习的多模态框架，利用行为数据和面部情绪特征，在保护隐私的前提下识别大学生职业焦虑和抑郁的早期指标，在巴基斯坦数据集上达到92%准确率，并识别出了回避目光、面部表达减少等关键行为标志。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大学生职业焦虑与抑郁问题日益严重，现有方法缺乏隐私保护、文化适应性及可解释性，难以在早期有效识别心理健康问题。

Method: 采用多模态中间融合神经网络（含注意力机制），结合结构化行为数据与面试视频面部情绪特征；使用标签平滑提升泛化性；通过联邦学习实现跨机构协作训练而不共享原始数据；利用Integrated Gradients和SHAP进行可解释性分析。

Result: 在巴基斯坦大学生心理健康调查数据集上，模型取得F1-score 89.12%、召回率86.54%、准确率92.08%、精确率91.88%。可解释性分析识别出回避目光、面部表达减少、社交退缩等关键抑郁行为标志。

Conclusion: 该研究提供一个可解释、可扩展且具有文化敏感性的AI心理健康预诊断系统，有望整合到全球学生支持服务中。

Abstract: Career anxiety and depression among university students present a growing challenge to mental health and academic achievement. This study proposes an Explainable AI (XAI) framework using multimodal data and Federated Learning (FL) to identify early indicators of career-related mental health problems in a privacy-preserving and culturally responsive manner. The framework combines structured behavioral data and facial emotion features from interview videos via an intermediate fusion neural network with attention mechanisms. Label smoothing was applied to improve model generalizability. FL was used across institutions to enable collaborative training without raw data sharing. Evaluation was conducted using the Student Mental Health Survey dataset from university students across Pakistan. Our model attained an F1-score of 89.12%, recall of 86.54%, accuracy of 92.08%, and precision of 91.88%. Using Integrated Gradients and SHAP, the model identified key behavioral markers of depression including avoidance of direct gaze, lower facial expressiveness, and social withdrawal, consistent with psychological theory. This research presents an interpretable, scalable, and context-sensitive AI system for mental health pre-diagnosis with potential integration into student support services globally.

</details>


### [621] [Balancing Performance and Diversity in GRPO Autoregressive Text-to-Image Post-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21498)
*Yuanhao Chiang,Hongbo Duan,Chunru Yang,Jiahua Pei,Yi Liu,Xueqian Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文针对自回归文生图（T2I）模型的人类偏好对齐问题，在GRPO式在线强化学习框架下，系统研究了不同f-散度（前向KL、反向KL、JS散度）对策略优化的影响，发现JS散度能实现最佳优化性能与生成多样性之间的平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自回归文生图方法在人类偏好对齐方面仍有不足，GRPO式在线强化学习虽有效但忽略了参考策略散度的固定设置对策略优化的直接影响，缺乏对不同散度形式的系统分析。

Method: 在统一的f-散度框架下理论分析了前向KL、反向KL和JS散度对GRPO式自回归T2I对齐中token级更新的不同影响，并在LlamaGen和Janus-7B上进行了实验验证。

Result: JS散度在多数评估指标上取得最强或极具竞争力的优化性能，同时保持了良好的生成多样性。

Conclusion: JS散度通过缓解对参考策略的均匀偏置并抑制大偏差，在GRPO式自回归T2I对齐中实现了最优的偏好对齐效果。

Abstract: Autoregressive text-to-image (T2I) generation has recently advanced rapidly, yet aligning generated images with human preferences remains challenging. GRPO-style online reinforcement learning provides an effective framework; however, existing methods typically treat reference-policy divergence as fixed, despite its direct impact on policy optimization. We study this overlooked factor within a unified f-divergence framework, encompassing forward KL, reverse KL, and JS divergence, for GRPO-style autoregressive T2I alignment. Our systematic theoretical analysis reveals that different divergences reshape token-level updates in distinct ways. In particular, under the sampled-token shaping form used, JS regularization achieves a favorable trade-off by mitigating uniform bias relative to the reference policy while still discouraging large deviations. Extensive experiments on LlamaGen and Janus-7B show that JS divergence achieves the strongest or highly competitive optimization performance on most evaluation metrics while maintaining favorable generation diversity. The code is available at https://github.com/tuoyou-hao/BPD-GRPO.

</details>


### [622] [AI Alignment From Social Choice Perspectives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21550)
*Daniel Halpern,Evi Micha,Ariel D. Procaccia,Benjamin Schiffer,Itai Shapira,Shirley Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文综述了如何从社会选择理论视角分析人类反馈中的偏好聚合问题，揭示了现有反馈聚合层的缺陷，并提出了处理分歧的设计空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当人类对模型行为的判断存在冲突时，如何将不同的偏好聚合成一个统一的、合理的训练目标是一个关键挑战。

Method: 采用社会选择理论作为分析框架，系统梳理和评估现有反馈聚合机制中的失败模式，并探索更广泛的设计可能性。

Result: 识别出反馈聚合层中存在的社会选择理论意义上的失败模式，并展示了处理分歧的多种设计选项。

Conclusion: 社会选择理论为理解和改进人类反馈中的偏好聚合问题提供了有力的工具，有助于设计更清晰、更原则性的处理分歧的方法。

Abstract: Alignment from human feedback uses human judgments about model outputs to steer the behavior of language models after pretraining. When those judgments reflect conflicting views of desirable behavior, the learned objective becomes an aggregate determination of what the model should prefer. We survey recent work that has studied this aggregation problem through the lens of social choice theory. We illustrate how the social choice perspective helps identify failure modes in the feedback aggregation layer and reveals a broader design space for handling disagreement in explicit and principled ways.

</details>


### [623] [Composing Verifiable Conceptual Models via Building Blocks: Towards Design-Time Verification of Agentic AI Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21565)
*Noe Y. Flandre,Alexander C. Nwala,Philippe J. Giabbanelli*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种在设计阶段验证多智能体AI工作流结构兼容性的方法，通过12条结构性规则检查可复用构建块的组合，并在两个数据集上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前Agentic AI系统在运行时安全方面已有较多支持，但在系统设计阶段缺乏对工作流的结构化验证手段，类似于建模与仿真中组合概念模型时未验证其构建块交互一致性的问题。

Method: 将智能体工作流建模为可复用构建块的组合，定义了12条结构性规则来检查构建块之间的兼容性，并在软件原型中实现了这些规则。

Result: 在两个公开数据集（48个已知缺陷工作流和168个结构变换但逻辑保留的变体）上进行了评估，验证器能够可靠地检测出设计缺陷，即使缺陷被任务拆分等结构变换所掩盖。

Conclusion: 未来可将该验证方法与社区构建块仓库结合，以组合出安全的智能体工作流。

Abstract: Agentic AI systems orchestrate multiple LLM-based agents through workflow architectures that coordinate decisions, tools, and external actions. While current platforms emphasize runtime safeguards, little support exists for verifying workflows during system design. From a Modeling \& Simulation perspective, this gap is analogous to composing conceptual models without verifying whether their building blocks interact coherently. We propose a design-time verification approach that models agentic workflows as compositions of reusable building blocks and checks their compatibility through twelve structural rules. We implemented these rules in a software prototype and evaluated them using two openly released datasets: 48 workflows with known design flaws and 168 variants that preserve workflow logic but alter graph structure. Results show that our verifier reliably detects violations even when flawed designs are obscured through structural transformations such as splitting tasks between agents. Future works could combine our verification with community repositories of building blocks to compose safe agentic workflows.

</details>


### [624] [Counsel: A Meta-Evaluation Dataset for Agentic Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21627)
